  usage_metric_type varchar [note: 'Category of usage measured (e.g., distance driven, connected hours).']
  usage_quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Measured amount of the usage metric for the period.']
  usage_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the usage record.']
  usage_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp marking the beginning of the usage interval.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing measurable usage of a connected mobility service by a vehicle or customer within a billing period. Captures usage period start/end, service reference, usage metric type (distance driven km, connected hours, data consumed MB, API calls, feature activations), measured quantity, unit of measure, rated flag, and billing period reference. Feeds usage-based billing in the billing domain and supports usage-based insurance (UBI) programs.'
}

Table mobility.remote_command {
  remote_command_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the remote command record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Remote command services incur operational costs tracked against a cost center; needed for the Remote Command Cost Allocation analysis.']
  customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer who initiated the command (if applicable).']
  fleet_operator_mobility_fleet_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the fleet operator issuing the command (if applicable).']
  mobility_fleet_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the fleet operator issuing the command (if applicable).']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer who initiated the command (if applicable).']
  acknowledgement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the vehicle acknowledged receipt of the command.']
  command_parameters varchar [note: 'Serialized JSON string containing command‑specific parameters (e.g., target temperature, charge schedule details).']
  command_reference varchar [note: 'Business identifier or reference code for the remote command issued.']
  command_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the command request (customer mobile app, fleet management portal, automated rule engine, or call center).']
  command_type varchar [note: 'Category of command sent to the vehicle (e.g., remote start, lock/unlock, climate pre‑conditioning, horn/lights, charge scheduling, speed limit set).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the remote command record was first created in the data lake.']
  delivery_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the command was successfully delivered to the vehicle\'s telematics unit.']
  execution_status varchar [note: 'Result of the command execution on the vehicle.']
  expiration_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Time after which the command is no longer valid if not executed.']
  failure_reason varchar [note: 'Textual description of why the command failed, if execution_status is failed.']
  issuance_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the remote command was created and sent to the vehicle.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the command for processing.']
  scheduled_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Optional future time at which the command should be executed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the remote command record.']
  vehicle_vin varchar [note: 'Unique vehicle identifier to which the command was sent.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a remote command issued to a connected vehicle by a customer, fleet operator, or automated system via the mobility platform. Captures command type (remote start, remote lock/unlock, climate pre-conditioning, horn/lights, charge scheduling for EV, speed limit set), command source (customer app, fleet portal, automated rule), issuance timestamp, delivery timestamp, vehicle acknowledgement timestamp, execution status, and failure reason if applicable.'
}

Table mobility.ev_charging_session {
  ev_charging_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the EV charging session record.']
  charger_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the physical charger unit that delivered energy.']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Charging sessions are performed for a specific connected vehicle; linking directly to the vehicle removes the need for the redundant VIN string column.']
  equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the physical charger unit that delivered energy.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Charging revenue is posted to a specific GL account; required for the EV Charging Revenue Ledger and regulatory revenue reporting.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.party. Business justification: Owner‑level billing and usage reporting for EV charging sessions depend on associating the session with the party that owns the vehicle.']
  charger_type varchar [note: 'Technical classification of the charger used for the session.']
  cost_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total monetary amount charged for the session before discounts or taxes.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the charging session record was first created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetary amounts.']
  discount_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary discount applied to the session, if any.']
  end_soc_percent varchar [note: 'Battery state of charge at the end of the session.']
  end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the charging session ended or was terminated.']
  energy_delivered_kwh decimal(8,3) [note: 'Total electrical energy transferred to the vehicle during the session.']
  estimated_range_added_km varchar [note: 'Estimated additional driving range provided by the energy delivered, based on vehicle model.']
  ev_charging_session_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the charging session.']
  firmware_version varchar [note: 'Software version of the charger at the time of the session.']
  is_ota_update_performed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an over‑the‑air firmware update was applied during the session.']
  latitude double [note: 'Latitude of the charging station in decimal degrees.']
  location_type varchar [note: 'Category of the charging location where the session occurred.']
  longitude double [note: 'Longitude of the charging station in decimal degrees.']
  net_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Final amount billed to the customer after discounts.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text field for additional remarks or operator comments.']
  odometer_km_at_end varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the end of the session.']
  odometer_km_at_start varchar [note: 'Vehicle odometer reading at the start of the session.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to settle the charging session cost.']
  peak_power_kw decimal(6,2) [note: 'Maximum charging power achieved during the session.']
  session_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Total elapsed time of the charging session.']
  session_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the charging session, used for customer reference and invoicing.']
  start_soc_percent varchar [note: 'Battery state of charge at the beginning of the session.']
  start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the charging session began.']
  station_city varchar [note: 'City where the charging station is located.']
  station_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the charging station.']
  station_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the charging station.']
  station_state varchar [note: 'State or province of the charging station location.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the charging session ended.']
  tpms_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Tire Pressure Monitoring System data was available.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the charging session record.']
  v2x_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Vehicle‑to‑Everything communication was active.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an EV or PHEV charging session for a connected vehicle, capturing charging session start/end timestamps, charging location (home, public EVSE, dealer), charger type (Level 1 AC, Level 2 AC, DC fast charge), energy delivered (kWh), peak charge rate (kW), state of charge at session start and end, estimated range added, charging cost, and session termination reason. Supports EV fleet management, range anxiety analytics, and charging infrastructure planning.'
}

Table mobility.service_incident {
  service_incident_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for service_incident']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Service incidents are tied to a specific vehicle; link to connected_vehicle for reporting.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Incidents generate repair expenses allocated to a cost center; required for the Incident Cost Tracking and warranty reserve calculations.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a connected mobility service incident or disruption affecting a vehicle or fleet account. Captures incident type (connectivity outage, OTA failure, remote command failure, telematics data gap, TPMS sensor fault, V2X communication failure), incident detection timestamp, affected vehicle or fleet scope, severity level, root cause category, resolution timestamp, and corrective action taken. Distinct from a DTC event (vehicle fault) — this is a service delivery incident.'
}

Table mobility.mobility_consent_record {
  mobility_consent_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the mobility_consent_record data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Consent records are always associated with a specific connected vehicle; linking enables direct joins to vehicle details and eliminates duplication of vehicle identifiers.']

  Note: 'Master record capturing a vehicle owner\'s or fleet operator\'s data privacy and service consent decisions for connected mobility services. Captures consent type (telematics data collection, location sharing, third-party data sharing, marketing communications, OTA update authorization), consent status (granted/withdrawn/pending), consent timestamp, consent version reference, collection channel (app, dealer, web portal), and jurisdiction (GDPR, CCPA, etc.). Required for regulatory compliance with data privacy laws governing connected vehicle data.'
}

Table mobility.software_version {
  software_version_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each software version record.']
  procurement_supplier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to procurement.supplier. Business justification: PROCUREMENT: Software licensing and regulatory reporting need the software vendor (supplier) identified for each version.']
  checksum varchar [note: 'Cryptographic hash of the software file used for integrity verification.']
  checksum_algorithm varchar [note: 'Algorithm used to generate the checksum value.']
  checksum_validated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the checksum has been successfully validated after upload.']
  compatible_vehicle_models varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of vehicle model identifiers that can receive this software version.']
  component_name varchar [note: 'Name of the software component or ECU that the version applies to (e.g., Infotainment ECU, ADAS Controller).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the software version record was first created in the data lake.']
  download_url varchar [note: 'Secure URL from which the software package can be retrieved for OTA deployment.']
  file_format varchar [note: 'Container or encoding format of the software package.']
  file_location_path varchar [note: 'Internal storage path or bucket location where the software binary resides.']
  file_size_bytes varchar [note: 'Size of the software binary or package in bytes.']
  hardware_dependency varchar [note: 'Textual description of hardware prerequisites beyond the minimum version (e.g., specific sensor revisions).']
  is_mandatory_update boolean [note: 'True if the update must be applied to maintain compliance or safety.']
  is_security_update boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the release contains security‑related patches.']
  minimum_hardware_version varchar [note: 'Lowest hardware/ECU version required for this software to operate.']
  regulatory_approval_date date [note: 'Date on which regulatory approval was granted.']
  regulatory_approval_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory approval document (e.g., UNECE WP.29 R156 SUMS).']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the regulatory approval for this software version.']
  release_cycle varchar [note: 'Planned cadence for releases of this software component.']
  release_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the software version was officially released.']
  release_notes varchar [note: 'Detailed release notes documenting bug fixes, new features, and known issues.']
  release_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the release indicating its purpose and maturity.']
  release_version_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used by engineering to track the release (e.g., RV20230401).']
  software_version_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the software version, its purpose and key changes.']
  software_version_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle status of the software version within the OTA ecosystem.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system of record for the software version (e.g., Geotab, Siemens Teamcenter).']
  supported_powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Powertrain categories for which the software version is applicable.']
  target_ecu varchar [note: 'Identifier of the electronic control unit (ECU) or system targeted by this software version.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the software version record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable version identifier following the vendor\'s versioning scheme (e.g., 2023.04.01).']

  Note: 'Reference master for all software and firmware versions managed within the OTA update ecosystem. Captures software component name, ECU or system target (infotainment, ADAS controller, powertrain ECU, body control module), version number, release type (production, beta, recall-fix, security patch), release date, minimum compatible hardware version, file size, checksum, and regulatory approval reference (UNECE WP.29 R156 SUMS compliance). Used by ota_campaign to define what is being deployed.'
}

Table mobility.service_tier {
  service_tier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for service_tier']

  Note: 'Reference data defining the service tier levels available for connected mobility subscriptions (e.g., Basic Connectivity, Advanced Telematics, Premium Connected, Fleet Pro). Captures tier name, tier code, included feature set, data allowance, OTA update frequency, remote diagnostics depth, V2X capability flag, ADAS feature access level, support SLA level, and pricing tier reference. Used by mobility_service and service_subscription to classify entitlement levels.'
}

Table mobility.vehicle_service_subscription {
  vehicle_service_subscription_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the VehicleServiceSubscription association']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'FK to the connected vehicle being subscribed']
  service_id varchar [note: 'FK to the mobility service offered']
  billing_amount decimal [note: 'Amount billed for each billing cycle']
  billing_cycle varchar [note: 'Billing frequency (monthly, yearly, usage‑based)']
  end_date date [note: 'Date the subscription ends or is terminated']
  start_date date [note: 'Date the subscription became effective']
  subscription_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the subscription contract']
  subscription_type varchar [note: 'Type of subscription (e.g., recurring, prepaid)']
  vehicle_service_subscription_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the subscription (active, suspended, cancelled)']

  Note: 'Represents the contractual subscription linking a connected vehicle to a mobility service. Each record captures the specific terms of that subscription such as dates, status, billing cycle and amount, which belong to the relationship rather than to the vehicle or service alone.. Existence Justification: A connected vehicle can be subscribed to multiple mobility services (e.g., OTA updates, V2X, remote diagnostics) and each mobility service can be provisioned for many vehicles across the fleet. The subscription itself is a managed business entity that records start/end dates, status, billing cycle and amount, and is created, updated, and terminated by operational processes.'
}

Table mobility.route {
  route_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for route']
  allowed_vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Vehicle types permitted on the route.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the route record was first created.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Originating system or provider of the route data.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the route.']
  distance_km double [note: 'Total length of the route in kilometers.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the route becomes effective for use.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the route ceases to be effective (null if open‑ended).']
  end_location varchar [note: 'Identifier or description of the route\'s ending point.']
  estimated_time_min varchar [note: 'Typical travel time for the route in minutes.']
  geometry_wkt varchar [note: 'Well‑Known Text representation of the route geometry.']
  gps_accuracy_meters varchar [note: 'Typical GPS accuracy for tracking on this route.']
  is_published boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the route is published to external partners.']
  is_toll_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates if certain vehicles are exempt from tolls on this route.']
  last_maintenance_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent maintenance activity on the route.']
  maintenance_interval_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between scheduled maintenance checks for the route.']
  max_load_tons double [note: 'Maximum vehicle load permitted on the route.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Operational priority of the route (1 = highest).']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region where the route is primarily located.']
  route_category varchar [note: 'Business category of the route.']
  route_code varchar [note: 'External business code or identifier for the route used in logistics and planning systems.']
  route_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the route.']
  route_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the route based on its physical characteristics.']
  speed_limit_kph varchar [note: 'Maximum legal speed limit on the route in kilometers per hour.']
  start_location varchar [note: 'Identifier or description of the route\'s starting point.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the route.']
  toll_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Standard toll amount for the route, if applicable.']
  toll_applicable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the route includes tolls.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the route record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the route definition for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for route. Referenced by route_id.'
}

Table mobility.ev_charger {
  ev_charger_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for ev_charger']
  location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the physical site or parking location where the charger is installed.']
  parent_ev_charger_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on ev_charger (parent_ev_charger_id)']
  pricing_plan_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the pricing plan governing usage fees for this charger.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the charger location.']
  asset_tag varchar [note: 'Internal asset‑tracking tag used by Automotive for inventory and maintenance.']
  average_session_duration_minutes decimal(6,2) [note: 'Mean length of charging sessions in minutes.']
  carbon_emission_reduction_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated kilograms of CO₂ emissions avoided due to the charger’s operation.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the charger is located.']
  commissioning_date date [note: 'Date the charger became operational and was accepted by the network.']
  compliance_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of safety and regulatory certifications (e.g., UL, IEC 61851).']
  connector_type varchar [note: 'Standardized connector plug type supported by the charger.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the charger location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the charger record was first created in the data lake.']
  current_amperage varchar [note: 'Maximum current the charger can draw, expressed in amperes.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the charger, including any special notes or installation details.']
  firmware_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the charger’s embedded firmware.']
  installation_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Capital expense incurred to install the charger at its site, in USD.']
  installation_date date [note: 'Date the charger was physically installed at its site.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'True if the charger is currently enabled for charging sessions.']
  is_public_access boolean [note: 'True if the charger is available to the general public; false if private/enterprise only.']
  last_maintenance_date date [note: 'Date the charger most recently underwent scheduled maintenance.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude coordinate of the charger (WGS‑84).']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude coordinate of the charger (WGS‑84).']
  maintenance_interval_days varchar [note: 'Scheduled number of days between routine maintenance activities.']
  manufacturer varchar [note: 'Company that produced the charger unit.']
  max_session_duration_minutes decimal(6,2) [note: 'Longest recorded charging session duration in minutes.']
  min_session_duration_minutes decimal(6,2) [note: 'Shortest recorded charging session duration in minutes.']
  model_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturer‑provided model identifier for the charger hardware.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or label assigned to the charger for display in portals and dashboards.']
  network_provider varchar [note: 'Company that operates the communication network for the charger (e.g., ChargePoint, EVgo).']
  operational_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Recurring cost to operate and maintain the charger per month, in USD.']
  power_rating_kw decimal(6,2) [note: 'Maximum power output the charger can deliver, expressed in kilowatts.']
  region varchar [note: 'State or province of the charger location.']
  safety_rating varchar [note: 'Safety classification of the charger according to industry standards.']
  serial_number varchar [note: 'Unique serial number stamped on the charger hardware.']
  software_version varchar [note: 'Version of the charger’s management software stack.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the charger.']
  total_energy_delivered_kwh decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate energy (kilowatt‑hours) dispensed by the charger across all sessions.']
  total_sessions varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of charging sessions recorded for the charger.']
  type varchar [note: 'Classification of charger as AC (Level 2) or DC (Fast) based on power delivery method.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the charger record.']
  voltage varchar [note: 'Nominal operating voltage of the charger.']
  warranty_end_date date [note: 'Date when the manufacturer warranty expires.']
  warranty_start_date date [note: 'Date when the manufacturer warranty begins.']
  zip_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code for the charger site.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for ev_charger. Referenced by charger_id.'
}

Table mobility.pricing_plan {
  pricing_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for pricing_plan']
  superseded_pricing_plan_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on pricing_plan (superseded_pricing_plan_id)']
  auto_renew boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the plan automatically renews at term end.']
  base_price decimal(12,2) [note: 'Standard recurring charge for the plan before any usage or overage fees.']
  billing_cycle varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the plan is billed to the customer.']
  compliance_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory frameworks governing the plan (e.g., GDPR, CCPA). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: GDPR|CCPA|HIPAA|PCI_DSS|ISO27001|NIST|Other — promote to reference product]']
  contract_term_months varchar [note: 'Fixed length of the contract in months.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the pricing plan record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code used for all monetary amounts in the plan.']
  data_retention_days varchar [note: 'Number of days telemetry data is retained for the plan.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the plan, its purpose and target market.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the pricing plan expires; null for open‑ended plans.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the pricing plan becomes binding.']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Business rules that determine which customers or vehicles may subscribe to the plan.']
  external_system_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the pricing plan in an external billing or CRM system.']
  feature_set varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of features or services included in the plan.']
  is_trial boolean [note: 'True if the plan is a trial offering.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the pricing plan record.']
  max_devices varchar [note: 'Maximum number of connected vehicle devices permitted under the plan.']
  overage_rate decimal(12,4) [note: 'Charge applied per unit of usage beyond the included limit.']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External business code used to reference the pricing plan in contracts and external systems.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the pricing plan.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the plan indicating how charges are structured.']
  price_adjustment_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the manual price adjustment.']
  price_adjustment_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for any manual price adjustment applied to the plan.']
  promotional_discount_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage discount applied when promotional_flag is true.']
  promotional_flag boolean [note: 'True if the plan is currently offered as a promotion.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country/region code where the plan is offered.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the pricing plan.']
  support_level varchar [note: 'Level of customer support included with the plan.']
  tax_included boolean [note: 'Indicates whether taxes are included in the base_price.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate expressed as a percentage.']
  termination_fee decimal(12,2) [note: 'Fee charged to the customer if the plan is terminated early.']
  trial_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the trial period lasts.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the pricing plan record.']
  usage_limit_quantity varchar [note: 'Maximum amount of usage included in the plan before overage charges apply.']
  usage_limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the usage limit (e.g., gigabytes, kilometers).']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Vehicle categories that the plan applies to.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for optimistic concurrency control.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the pricing plan record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for pricing_plan. Referenced by pricing_plan_id.'
}

Table finance.gl_account {
  gl_account_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the GL account record.']
  account_code varchar [note: 'External business code used to identify the GL account in the chart of accounts.']
  account_group varchar [note: 'Higher‑level grouping used for reporting and posting rules.']
  account_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the GL account.']
  account_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the account as asset, liability, equity, revenue, or expense.']
  balance_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the account is reported on the balance sheet or the profit & loss statement.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Approved budget amount allocated to the account for the fiscal year, expressed in the account currency.']
  chart_of_accounts_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the chart of accounts in which this account is defined.']
  closing_balance decimal(18,2) [note: 'Balance of the account at the end of the fiscal year.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Code of the cost center to which the account is assigned for internal cost allocation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the GL account record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code in which the account balances are expressed.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date on which the GL account becomes active for posting.']
  effective_to date [note: 'Date on which the GL account is retired or becomes inactive; null if open‑ended.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year (FY) to which the account is primarily associated for budgeting.']
  gl_account_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing additional context about the account.']
  gl_account_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the account.']
  is_budgeted boolean [note: 'True if the account has an associated budget for the fiscal year.']
  is_consolidation_account boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the account participates in legal entity consolidation reporting.']
  is_deprecated boolean [note: 'True if the account is scheduled for phase‑out and should no longer be used for new postings.']
  is_reconciliation_account boolean [note: 'True if the account is used as a reconciliation (clearing) account for sub‑ledger postings.']
  is_tax_relevant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the account participates in tax calculations.']
  last_posting_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent posting to this GL account.']
  last_reconciliation_date date [note: 'Date when the account was last reconciled with sub‑ledger balances.']
  opening_balance decimal(18,2) [note: 'Balance of the account at the start of the fiscal year.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Code of the profit center linked to the account for profitability reporting.']
  reporting_level varchar [note: 'Level in the reporting hierarchy at which the account is aggregated.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Business segment to which the account belongs (e.g., OEM, Aftermarket, Service, R&D).']
  tax_category varchar [note: 'Category defining the tax treatment applied to postings in this account.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the GL account record.']

  Note: 'General Ledger (GL) account master record aligned with SAP FI chart of accounts. Defines each account in the corporate chart of accounts including account type (asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense), account group, P&L vs balance sheet classification, currency, tax category, and reconciliation account flags. SSOT for all GL account definitions used across FI/CO postings, IFRS/GAAP reporting, and SOX compliance controls.'
}

Table finance.cost_center {
  cost_center_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the cost center master record.']
  parent_cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the immediate parent cost center in the hierarchy (null for top‑level).']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant to which the cost center is assigned.']
  actual_spend decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative actual expenses posted to the cost center.']
  allocation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to allocate indirect costs to the cost center.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval state of the cost center\'s budget.']
  budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Planned budget amount allocated to the cost center for the fiscal year.']
  cost_center_category varchar [note: 'Higher‑level classification of the cost center for reporting purposes.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'External business code assigned to the cost center (e.g., SAP CO cost center code).']
  cost_center_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the cost center purpose and scope.']
  cost_center_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the cost center used in reports and UI.']
  cost_center_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the cost center.']
  cost_center_type varchar [note: 'Category of the cost center indicating its primary function within the organization.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the cost center\'s primary location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cost center record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency code used for budgeting and reporting.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the cost center becomes valid for posting costs.']
  effective_to date [note: 'Date when the cost center is retired or no longer valid (nullable).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the budget is defined (e.g., FY2025).']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'Depth of the cost center within the organizational hierarchy (1 = top level).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the cost center\'s budget and performance were last reviewed.']
  region varchar [note: 'Business region (e.g., North America, Europe) where the cost center operates.']
  reporting_level varchar [note: 'Level at which the cost center is aggregated for financial reporting.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the cost center record.']
  variance_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Difference between budgeted and actual spend (budget – actual).']

  Note: 'Cost center master record representing an organizational unit to which manufacturing costs, labor, overhead, and indirect expenses are assigned. Aligned with SAP CO cost center accounting (CCA). Captures cost center hierarchy, responsible manager, plant assignment, profit center linkage, valid-from/to dates, currency, and cost center category (production, administration, R&D, sales). Supports EBITDA reporting and profitability analysis by plant, vehicle line, and region.'
}

Table finance.profit_center {
  profit_center_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the profit center record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Surrogate key of the employee responsible for the profit center.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Surrogate key of the employee who owns the profit center.']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Surrogate key of the employee who owns the profit center.']
  parent_profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the immediate parent profit center in the hierarchy.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant associated with the profit center.']
  primary_profit_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'FK to workforce.employee']
  actual_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Actual realized amount for the profit center in the current period.']
  audit_trail varchar [note: 'JSON‑encoded log of significant changes to the profit center record.']
  budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Approved budget for the profit center for the fiscal year.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date on which the profit center was officially closed.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'SAP company code to which the profit center belongs.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status with internal and external regulatory requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the profit center record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency in which the profit center records its transactions.']
  ebitda_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization for the profit center.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the profit center became operational.']
  effective_to date [note: 'Date when the profit center is scheduled to be retired (nullable for open‑ended).']
  external_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier used in external ERP or reporting systems to reference this profit center.']
  hierarchy_path varchar [note: 'Slash‑delimited path showing the profit center\'s position in the hierarchy (e.g., /1000/2000/3000).']
  is_consolidated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the profit center is included in corporate consolidation.']
  is_intercompany boolean [note: 'True if the profit center participates in intercompany transactions.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent financial or operational review.']
  margin_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Profit margin expressed as a percentage of revenue.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes or comments about the profit center.']
  owner varchar [note: 'Name of the business owner or sponsor of the profit center.']
  plan_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Planned financial amount for the upcoming period.']
  profit_center_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category such as Vehicle Line, Service, Parts, or Finance.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code used in SAP and external reports.']
  profit_center_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the profit center\'s purpose and scope.']
  profit_center_group varchar [note: 'Logical grouping used for internal reporting (e.g., Group A, Group B).']
  profit_center_level varchar [note: 'Numeric depth of the profit center within the organizational hierarchy.']
  profit_center_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the profit center.']
  profit_center_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the profit center.']
  profit_center_type varchar [note: 'Category of profit center indicating its accounting purpose.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter code representing the geographic region of the profit center.']
  reporting_currency varchar [note: 'Currency used for consolidated financial reporting of the profit center.']
  review_cycle varchar [note: 'Frequency of scheduled reviews for the profit center.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating assigned to the profit center based on financial and operational exposure.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment classification of the profit center (e.g., electric vehicle, internal combustion, hybrid, commercial).']
  status_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation for the current status of the profit center.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who performed the last update.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the profit center record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the record.']

  Note: 'Profit center master record representing a management accounting unit used to analyze profitability by vehicle line, plant, region, or business segment. Aligned with SAP CO-PCA (Profit Center Accounting). Captures profit center hierarchy, responsible manager, company code assignment, segment classification (EV, ICE, HEV, commercial), and reporting currency. Enables contribution margin and EBITDA analysis at granular business unit level.'
}

Table finance.company_code {
  company_code_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying the company code record.']
  intercompany_group_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the intercompany settlement group to which the entity belongs.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the legal entity.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address information (suite, floor, etc.).']
  business_line varchar [note: 'Primary business line or functional area of the entity. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: design_engineering|manufacturing|sales|after_sales|r&d|finance|procurement — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  chart_of_accounts varchar [note: 'Identifier of the chart of accounts used for financial posting.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the legal entity is located.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Alphanumeric identifier used in SAP FI to represent the legal entity (e.g., US01, DE02).']
  company_code_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the legal entity.']
  consolidation_group varchar [note: 'Group identifier used for legal consolidation of financial statements.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center identifier for internal cost allocation.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the legal entity is incorporated.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the company code record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the company code ceases to be effective (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the company code becomes effective for accounting.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for corporate communications.']
  entity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the legal entity within the corporate structure.']
  fiscal_year_variant varchar [note: 'SAP fiscal year variant code defining the fiscal calendar for the entity.']
  functional_currency varchar [note: 'Currency in which the entity\'s internal transactions are recorded.']
  industry_sector varchar [note: 'Broad industry segment in which the entity operates.']
  is_consolidated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the entity is included in group consolidation.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the company as registered with the jurisdiction.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle stage of the entity (e.g., active, suspended, terminated, draft).']
  local_currency varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code of the entity\'s functional currency for local reporting.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact telephone number for the legal entity.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code for the entity\'s address.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Code of the profit center to which the entity reports.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration number assigned by the corporate registry.']
  reporting_standard varchar [note: 'Accounting framework used for statutory reporting (e.g., IFRS, US GAAP).']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment (global, regional, local) used in management reporting.']
  short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated or commonly used name for the legal entity.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the entity\'s address.']
  tax_id_number varchar [note: 'Government‑issued tax identifier for the legal entity.']
  tax_jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction applicable to the entity.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the company code record.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL of the legal entity.']

  Note: 'Legal entity and company code master record representing an independent accounting unit within the Automotive enterprise. Aligned with SAP FI company code configuration. Captures legal entity name, country of incorporation, fiscal year variant, chart of accounts assignment, local currency, functional currency, IFRS/GAAP reporting standard, tax jurisdiction, and intercompany settlement group. Supports multi-entity consolidation and intercompany eliminations.'
}

Table finance.fiscal_period {
  fiscal_period_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the fiscal period record.']
  accrual_cutoff_date date [note: 'Date after which accruals are no longer allowed for this period.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Organizational code of the legal entity to which the period applies.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the fiscal period record was initially created in the system.']
  fiscal_period_description varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text notes describing special characteristics of the period.']
  fiscal_period_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the period used for posting: open, closed, or locked.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit calendar year to which the period belongs, e.g., 2024.']
  fiscal_year_variant varchar [note: 'Identifier for the fiscal year variant configuration (e.g., 12‑month, 4‑quarter, 13‑period).']
  is_current_period boolean [note: 'True if this period is the active period for ongoing postings.']
  is_interim boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the period is an interim reporting period (true) or a full fiscal period (false).']
  lock_date date [note: 'Date on which the period was locked for posting; null if not locked.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the fiscal period.']
  period_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable label for the period, e.g., "January", "Q1", "Special Adjustment".']
  period_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the period within the fiscal year (1‑12 for monthly, 1‑4 for quarterly).']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the fiscal period.']
  period_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the period: regular reporting, adjustment, or special period.']
  posting_deadline_date date [note: 'Final date by which all transactions must be posted to this period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the fiscal period record.']

  Note: 'Fiscal period and fiscal year (FY) calendar reference master defining the financial reporting periods used across the enterprise. Captures fiscal year, period number, period name, start date, end date, period status (open, closed, locked), period type (regular, special/adjustment), and company code applicability. Governs FY close processes, period-end accruals, and IFRS/GAAP reporting windows. Aligned with SAP FI fiscal year variant configuration.'
}

Table finance.journal_entry {
  journal_entry_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the journal entry record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Replace string company_code with FK to company_code for proper relational integrity.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Reference cost_center master instead of free‑text code.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that performed the posting.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Link journal entry to fiscal period master for consistent period handling.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the business partner (vendor, customer, or other) associated with the entry.']
  posting_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that performed the posting.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Reference profit_center master for reporting consistency.']
  amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of the journal entry in the document currency.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the journal entry record was created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code of the amounts.']
  debit_credit_indicator varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the line is a debit or credit.']
  document_date date [note: 'Date recorded on the accounting document (may differ from posting date).']
  document_language varchar [note: 'Language key of the document (e.g., EN, DE).']
  document_number varchar [note: 'External document number assigned by SAP FI for the journal entry.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Type of accounting document (e.g., SA – General Ledger, KR – Vendor Invoice, AB – Customer Invoice).']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate used to convert foreign currency to local currency.']
  exchange_rate_type varchar [note: 'Type of exchange rate (e.g., M – average, G – spot).']
  intercompany_indicator boolean [note: 'True if the entry is part of an intercompany transaction.']
  is_adjustment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the entry is an adjusting entry (e.g., accrual).']
  is_consolidated boolean [note: 'True if the entry is part of a consolidated financial statement.']
  is_manual_entry boolean [note: 'True if the entry was entered manually rather than by automated process.']
  is_test_entry boolean [note: 'True if the entry is a test or simulation record.']
  journal_entry_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the journal entry.']
  ledger_group varchar [note: 'Ledger group indicating IFRS or local GAAP ledger.']
  line_item_count varchar [note: 'Number of line items associated with this journal entry.']
  plant varchar [note: 'Plant code where the transaction originated.']
  posting_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category of the posting (e.g., GL, AP, AR).']
  posting_key varchar [note: 'SAP posting key defining the transaction type (e.g., 40 for debit).']
  posting_period varchar [note: 'Posting period identifier (e.g., 202401).']
  posting_reference varchar [note: 'External reference identifier (e.g., external system ID).']
  posting_text varchar [note: 'User‑defined text describing the posting.']
  posting_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the entry was posted to the ledger.']
  posting_user_role varchar [note: 'Role of the user who posted the entry (e.g., accountant, system).']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number linking to related documents (e.g., invoice).']
  reversal_document_number varchar [note: 'Document number of the original entry being reversed.']
  reversal_indicator boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the entry is a reversal of a previous entry.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment identifier for internal reporting (e.g., automotive, powertrain).']
  source_module varchar [note: 'Specific module within the source system (e.g., FI‑GL).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system that generated the entry (e.g., SAP S/4HANA).']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Tax amount calculated for the entry.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied to the entry for tax determination.']
  tax_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Tax jurisdiction code applicable to the entry.']
  transaction_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the business transaction (e.g., AP, AR).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the journal entry record.']

  Note: 'General ledger journal entry header record capturing all financial postings in the SAP FI ledger. Represents the primary transactional record for every accounting document including goods issue postings, vendor invoice postings, customer payments, accruals, depreciation runs, intercompany settlements, and manual adjustments. Captures document type, posting date, fiscal year/period, company code, reference document, posting user, reversal indicator, and ledger group (IFRS vs local GAAP). SSOT for all GL postings.'
}

Table finance.journal_entry_line {
  journal_entry_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the journal entry line record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Link line to cost_center master for cost allocation.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace string GL account code with FK to gl_account master.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent journal entry (header) to which this line belongs.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Link line to profit_center master for profitability reporting.']
  wbs_element_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.wbs_element. Business justification: Reference WBS element master for project cost tracking.']
  account_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the GL account (e.g., balance sheet, profit & loss).']
  amount_cc decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount posted on the line in the company code (local) currency.']
  amount_tc decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount posted on the line in the transaction currency.']
  assignment varchar [note: 'User‑defined assignment field for additional categorisation (e.g., cost object).']
  business_area varchar [note: 'Business area classification for reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the journal entry line record was created in the system.']
  currency_cc varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the company code (local) currency.']
  currency_tc varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the transaction currency.']
  debit_credit_indicator varchar [note: 'Flag indicating whether the line is a debit (D) or credit (C).']
  document_date date [note: 'Date printed on the accounting document.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert amount_tc to amount_cc.']
  exchange_rate_type varchar [note: 'Identifier of the exchange rate type (e.g., M for market, A for average).']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month or period code) of the posting.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year of the posting (e.g., 2024).']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the line within the journal entry, used for ordering.']
  line_text varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the line item.']
  plant varchar [note: 'Manufacturing plant or location code associated with the posting.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date on which the line is posted to the ledger.']
  posting_key varchar [note: 'SAP posting key that determines the type of posting (e.g., debit/credit).']
  quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Quantity associated with the line (e.g., number of units, hours).']
  reference_document_item varchar [note: 'Item number of the referenced external document.']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'External document number referenced by this line (e.g., invoice).']
  reversal_indicator boolean [note: 'True if this line reverses a previous posting.']
  segment varchar [note: 'Segment code for profitability analysis.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used for tax calculation on the line.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the journal entry line record.']

  Note: 'Individual line item within a GL journal entry, representing a single debit or credit posting to a GL account. Captures GL account, debit/credit indicator, posting amount in transaction currency and company code currency, cost center, profit center, WBS element, plant, tax code, assignment field, and line item text. Supports detailed cost allocation, profitability analysis, and SOX audit trail requirements. Aligned with SAP FI line item table (BSEG).'
}

Table finance.ap_invoice {
  ap_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the AP invoice record.']
  trade_compliance_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.trade_compliance_record. Business justification: AP invoices for imported parts must reference the trade compliance record to ensure customs duties and export‑control compliance.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier that issued the invoice.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the invoice for internal accounting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code of the invoice amount.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Early payment or contractual discount applied to the invoice.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment must be made according to payment terms.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert invoice currency to the reporting currency.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the invoice belongs.']
  goods_receipt_number varchar [note: 'Reference to the goods receipt that triggered the invoice.']
  gross_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total invoice amount before taxes and discounts.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date the supplier issued the invoice.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'Vendor-assigned invoice number used for reference and matching.']
  invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the invoice.']
  is_credit_memo boolean [note: 'True if the record represents a credit memo rather than a standard invoice.']
  material_group varchar [note: 'Group classification of materials purchased.']
  net_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Invoice amount after tax and discounts.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes entered on the invoice for additional context.']
  payment_block_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether payment of the invoice is blocked (true) or allowed (false).']
  payment_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was paid.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used for payment (e.g., ACH, Wire, Check).']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the payment transaction.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms code governing the invoice.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturing plant code related to the invoice.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  ppap_status varchar [note: 'Status of the Production Part Approval Process for the supplier.']
  purchase_order_number varchar [note: 'Reference to the purchase order associated with the invoice.']
  reporting_currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code used for financial reporting of the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax amount included in the invoice.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used for tax calculation on the invoice.']
  three_way_match_flag boolean [note: 'True when purchase order, goods receipt, and invoice are matched.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the last update to the invoice record.']
  warranty_reserve_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Amount reserved for warranty liability related to the invoice.']

  Note: 'Accounts Payable (AP) vendor invoice record capturing supplier invoices received for direct materials (production parts, CKD/SKD kits), indirect materials (MRO, tooling), and services. Aligned with SAP FI-AP (Accounts Payable) module. Captures vendor ID, invoice date, posting date, payment terms, gross amount, tax amount, net amount, currency, payment block status, three-way match status (PO/GR/IR), due date, and payment method. Supports PPAP-related supplier payment tracking and cash flow management.'
}

Table finance.ap_payment {
  ap_payment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the payment transaction.']
  payment_run_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the batch run that processed this payment.']
  payment_settlement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to settlement batch.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier/vendor receiving the payment.']
  amount_gross decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total payment amount before taxes and discounts.']
  amount_net decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount after tax and discount.']
  bank_account_number varchar [note: 'Bank account number used for the payment (PCI-sensitive).']
  clearance_date date [note: 'Date when the payment cleared the bank.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code of the payment.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Discount applied to the payment.']
  early_payment_discount_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if an early payment discount was applied.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate applied if payment currency differs from functional currency.']
  house_bank_code varchar [note: 'Code of the house bank handling the payment.']
  is_automated boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the payment was processed automatically.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment was initiated.']
  payment_comments varchar [note: 'Additional comments or notes regarding the payment.']
  payment_cost_center varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the payment.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Calendar date of the payment (date part).']
  payment_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description or memo for the payment.']
  payment_document_number varchar [note: 'Document number assigned to the payment in the ERP system.']
  payment_due_date date [note: 'Original due date of the invoice(s) being paid.']
  payment_error_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the payment encountered an error.']
  payment_exchange_rate_date date [note: 'Date on which the exchange rate was determined.']
  payment_fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month/quarter) of the payment.']
  payment_fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year of the payment.']
  payment_gl_account varchar [note: 'General Ledger account code charged for the payment.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to make the payment (e.g., ACH, wire, check, EFT).']
  payment_original_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment amount in original invoice currency.']
  payment_original_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the original invoice amount.']
  payment_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned to the payment.']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number provided by the vendor or bank.']
  payment_settlement_date date [note: 'Date of the settlement batch.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the payment.']
  payment_tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code applied to the payment.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Contractual payment terms (e.g., Net30).']
  payment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the payment was executed.']
  payment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates if the payment is outbound (to vendor) or inbound (refund).']
  payment_vat_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Value-added tax amount included in the payment.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component of the payment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payment record.']

  Note: 'Accounts Payable payment transaction record capturing outgoing payments made to suppliers and vendors. Captures payment run ID, payment date, vendor ID, bank account, payment method (ACH, wire, check), payment amount, currency, cleared invoice references, payment document number, house bank, and payment status. Supports supplier payment performance tracking, cash management, and working capital optimization aligned with JIT/JIS supply chain payment terms.'
}

Table finance.ar_invoice {
  ar_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the AR invoice record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the related legal entity in an intercompany invoice.']
  customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the customer or dealer billed on the invoice.']
  intercompany_entity_company_code_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the related legal entity in an intercompany invoice.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the customer or dealer billed on the invoice.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vin_registry. Business justification: Accounts receivable invoices for vehicle sales must reference the VIN registry to validate warranty eligibility and tax reporting.']
  accounting_date date [note: 'Date used for accounting period posting.']
  aging_bucket varchar [note: 'Age category of the invoice based on days past due.']
  ar_invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the invoice.']
  billing_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the SAP billing document linked to this invoice.']
  collection_status varchar [note: 'Status of the invoice in the collections process.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center responsible for the expense.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the invoice.']
  delivery_note_number varchar [note: 'Delivery document associated with the shipped goods.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value of any discount applied to the invoice.']
  discount_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or code for the discount granted.']
  distribution_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the product was sold (e.g., dealer, fleet, direct).']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment is expected according to payment terms.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month) within the fiscal year.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the invoice belongs (e.g., 2025).']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount before taxes, discounts, and adjustments.']
  intercompany_flag boolean [note: 'True if the invoice is part of an intercompany transaction.']
  invoice_category varchar [note: 'Business segment or market category for the invoice.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was issued to the customer.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'External invoice identifier assigned by the billing system.']
  invoice_type varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the invoice content.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount payable after taxes and discounts.']
  payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount actually received from the customer.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used by the customer to settle the invoice.']
  payment_received_date date [note: 'Date on which payment was recorded.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the payment transaction.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment condition applied to the invoice.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturing plant where the vehicle or part was produced.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit center attributing revenue from the invoice.']
  purchase_order_number varchar [note: 'Purchase order from the customer or dealer, if applicable.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Geographic region code for reporting and tax purposes.']
  revenue_recognition_date date [note: 'Date on which revenue from this invoice is recognized per accounting policy.']
  sales_order_number varchar [note: 'Sales order that triggered the invoice.']
  sales_org_code varchar [note: 'Code of the sales organization responsible for the transaction.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total tax calculated for the invoice.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax jurisdiction code used for tax calculation.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate percentage for the invoice.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the invoice record.']
  warranty_reserve_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount set aside for future warranty claims related to this invoice.']
  warranty_reserve_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a warranty reserve has been booked for this invoice.']

  Note: 'Accounts Receivable (AR) customer invoice record capturing outgoing invoices issued to dealers, fleet customers, and intercompany entities for vehicle sales, parts, and services. Aligned with SAP FI-AR and SD billing integration. Captures customer/dealer ID, invoice date, due date, payment terms, gross amount, tax amount, net amount, currency, billing document reference, vehicle line, MSRP vs net selling price, and collection status. Supports dealer billing reconciliation and revenue recognition.'
}

Table finance.ar_payment {
  ar_payment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the AR payment record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who performed the posting operation.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party (dealer, fleet account, or intercompany entity) that made the payment.']
  payer_party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party (dealer, fleet account, or intercompany entity) that made the payment.']
  posted_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who performed the posting operation.']
  ar_payment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payment.']
  bank_account_number varchar [note: 'Bank account number where the payment was received.']
  bank_name varchar [note: 'Name of the bank that received the payment.']
  cash_application_status varchar [note: 'Status of cash application against the invoice(s).']
  clearance_date date [note: 'Date the payment cleared the bank and was posted to the ledger.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code of the payment.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Discounts applied to the payment, if any.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which the payment was expected according to terms.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Currency conversion rate applied when payment currency differs from functional currency.']
  exchange_rate_date date [note: 'Date on which the exchange rate was sourced.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount received before any deductions.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'Invoice identifier that this payment clears or partially clears.']
  is_partial_payment boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the payment covers the full invoice amount.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount applied to the invoice after tax and discounts.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form text for any additional information about the payment.']
  original_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment amount in the original foreign currency before conversion.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment was submitted.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Date the payment was received or processed.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Instrument used to make the payment.']
  payment_number varchar [note: 'Unique payment reference assigned by the finance system.']
  payment_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the payment within the organization.']
  payment_terms_code varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms associated with the invoice.']
  posting_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment was posted to the general ledger.']
  remittance_reference varchar [note: 'Reference provided by the payer to reconcile the payment.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component deducted from the gross amount, if applicable.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payment record.']

  Note: 'Accounts Receivable incoming payment record capturing payments received from dealers, fleet accounts, and intercompany entities against AR invoices. Captures payment date, customer/dealer ID, payment method, amount received, currency, cleared invoice references, bank account, remittance advice reference, partial payment indicator, and cash application status. Supports dealer receivables management, DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) tracking, and cash flow forecasting.'
}

Table finance.capex_request {
  capex_request_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the CapEx request record.']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who approved the CapEx request.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'System user identifier who created the record.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Code of the department submitting the request.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Code of the manufacturing plant where the investment will be implemented.']
  primary_capex_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who created the CapEx request.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Capex requests must be tied to the specific regulatory requirement they satisfy for compliance tracking and audit.']
  requested_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who created the CapEx request.']
  updated_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'System user identifier who last modified the record.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external supplier for the investment, if applicable.']
  actual_end_date date [note: 'Date when the project was actually completed.']
  actual_spend_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cumulative amount actually spent to date on the project.']
  approval_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the request received final approval.']
  approved_budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Budget amount approved by the governance board.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated total cost of the proposed investment.']
  capex_request_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the proposed capital investment, including objectives and scope.']
  capex_request_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the request.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Internal cost center responsible for the expenditure.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the budget.']
  depreciation_method varchar [note: 'Accounting method used to depreciate the capital asset.']
  depreciation_years varchar [note: 'Number of years over which the asset will be depreciated.']
  external_funding_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value of external funding contributions.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the request belongs (e.g., FY2024).']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Name of the external entity providing funding (e.g., government grant, joint venture).']
  has_external_funding boolean [note: 'Indicates whether part of the investment is funded by external sources.']
  investment_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the investment type.']
  irr decimal(5,2) [note: 'Internal rate of return percentage for the proposed investment.']
  is_capitalized boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the expense is capitalized (true) or expensed (false).']
  is_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the request complies with all applicable regulations.']
  justification varchar [note: 'Business case narrative explaining the need and expected benefits.']
  npv decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net present value of the investment calculated in the request currency.']
  payback_period_years decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated number of years to recover the investment.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the request.']
  procurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to acquire the goods or services.']
  project_end_date date [note: 'Planned completion date of the capital project.']
  project_start_date date [note: 'Planned start date of the capital project.']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Status of any required regulatory approvals for the investment.']
  request_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the request was initially submitted.']
  request_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the request (e.g., CR‑2024‑001).']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk assessment rating for the proposed investment.']
  supporting_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to attached supporting documentation stored in the document management system.']
  tax_implication varchar [note: 'Notes on tax treatment or incentives related to the investment.']
  title varchar [note: 'Brief title describing the investment proposal.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the record.']
  wbs_element varchar [note: 'Hierarchical code linking the request to the project’s WBS.']

  Note: 'Capital Expenditure (CapEx) appropriation request record capturing investment proposals for manufacturing equipment, tooling, plant infrastructure, EV battery production lines, and R&D facilities. Captures project title, requesting plant/department, investment category (tooling, machinery, IT, facility, EV/autonomous R&D), estimated total cost, approved budget, actual spend to date, project start/end dates, approval workflow status, NPV/IRR justification, and WBS element linkage. Supports CapEx governance and FY budget planning.'
}

Table finance.budget_plan {
  budget_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the budget plan record.']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Budget plans must be signed off by a responsible employee; approved_by_employee_id captures the approver.']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the project linked to this budget plan, if applicable.']
  allocation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to allocate the budget across cost objects.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the budget plan received formal approval.']
  budget_category varchar [note: 'High‑level business area the budget pertains to.']
  budget_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the budget plan.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Code of the cost center responsible for the budget.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the budget plan record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the budget amounts.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the budget plan expires or is superseded (nullable).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the budget plan becomes effective.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the budget applies.']
  gl_account varchar [note: 'GL account to which the budgeted amounts are posted.']
  is_forecast boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the plan is a forecast rather than a firm budget.']
  is_locked boolean [note: 'True if the budget plan is locked from further edits.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or remarks about the budget plan.']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the budget plan in financial systems.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the budget plan.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the budget plan indicating its purpose.']
  planned_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Original budgeted monetary amount.']
  planning_period varchar [note: 'Period covered by the budget (e.g., FY2025, Q1).']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Code of the profit center linked to the budget.']
  revised_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Updated budget amount after revisions.']
  scenario varchar [note: 'Analytical scenario applied to the budget (e.g., base, optimistic, pessimistic).']
