  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system for the budget data (e.g., SAP CO, BPC).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the budget plan.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Sequential version of the budget plan for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Annual and multi-year financial budget plan record capturing planned financial targets by cost center, profit center, GL account, and fiscal year. Supports FY budget planning, rolling forecast cycles, and variance analysis. Captures budget version (original, revised, forecast), budget type (opex, capex, headcount), planning period, planned amount, currency, approval status, and responsible controller. Aligned with SAP CO planning and SAP BPC (Business Planning and Consolidation) processes.'
}

Table finance.budget_line {
  budget_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the budget line record.']
  budget_header_budget_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent budget plan header to which this line belongs.']
  budget_plan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent budget plan header to which this line belongs.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Reference cost_center master from budget line.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace GL account code with FK to gl_account for budget line consolidation.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Reference profit_center master from budget line.']
  allocation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to allocate the budget amount across cost objects.']
  amount_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the amount reflects the original plan, a revision, or a committed figure.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the budget line was approved by the finance authority.']
  budget_line_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the purpose or nature of the budget line.']
  budget_line_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the budget line.']
  business_unit varchar [note: 'Organizational unit (e.g., North America, Europe) responsible for the budget line.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes captured by the planner.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the budget line record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) for the monetary values.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Calendar date when the budget line expires; null if open‑ended.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Calendar date when the budget line becomes effective.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Period within the fiscal year (e.g., month number or quarter) applicable to the budget line.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year (e.g., 2024) for which the budget line is planned.']
  is_manual boolean [note: 'True if the budget line was entered manually rather than generated by a planning run.']
  justification varchar [note: 'Narrative explanation for the budget amount, required for audit and approval.']
  line_quantity decimal(12,2) [note: 'Number of units, hours, or other measure being budgeted.']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential order of the line within the budget header.']
  planned_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Original amount budgeted for this line, expressed in the specified currency.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant associated with the budget line.']
  product_line varchar [note: 'Vehicle or product line (e.g., SUV, Truck) to which the budget amount applies.']
  revised_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Updated amount after revisions; may differ from the original planned amount.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source ERP or financial system (e.g., SAP FI/CO) that supplied the record.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit for the line_quantity (e.g., units, hours, liters).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the budget line record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version for change‑tracking and concurrency control.']

  Note: 'Individual line item within a budget plan capturing the planned financial amount for a specific GL account, cost center, profit center, and fiscal period combination. Enables granular budget-vs-actual variance analysis at the account and cost object level. Captures budget plan reference, GL account, cost center, profit center, fiscal year, fiscal period, planned amount, revised amount, currency, and line item description. Supports monthly budget monitoring and FY close reconciliation.'
}

Table finance.manufacturing_cost {
  manufacturing_cost_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each manufacturing cost record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the cost center responsible for the production order.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant where the cost was incurred.']
  production_order_id varchar [note: 'SAP production order number linked to this cost record.']
  actual_energy_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Energy cost actually incurred.']
  actual_fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fixed overhead actually incurred.']
  actual_labor_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Direct labor cost actually incurred.']
  actual_material_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Real material cost incurred during production.']
  actual_scrap_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual cost of scrap and rework.']
  actual_tooling_amortization_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Actual tooling amortization recorded.']
  actual_variable_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Variable overhead actually incurred.']
  cost_calculation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the cost calculation was performed.']
  cost_record_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the cost record, typically generated by SAP CO-PC.']
  cost_variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Difference between actual and standard total cost (actual - standard).']
  cost_variance_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Cost variance expressed as a percentage of standard cost.']
  costing_date date [note: 'Date on which the costing run was executed.']
  costing_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the costing run (e.g., \'V1\', \'V2\').']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cost record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code used for cost amounts.']
  is_variance_exceed_threshold boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cost variance exceeds a predefined tolerance.']
  manufacturing_cost_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the cost record.']
  standard_energy_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned energy (electricity, gas) cost for production.']
  standard_fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned fixed overhead (e.g., depreciation, rent).']
  standard_labor_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned direct labor cost based on standard rates.']
  standard_material_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned material cost per SAP standard costing.']
  standard_scrap_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned cost associated with scrap and rework.']
  standard_tooling_amortization_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned amortization of tooling and fixtures.']
  standard_variable_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned variable overhead (e.g., utilities, consumables).']
  total_actual_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of all actual cost components.']
  total_standard_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of all standard cost components.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the cost record.']
  variance_threshold_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary threshold used to evaluate cost variance significance.']
  vehicle_line varchar [note: 'Product line (e.g., SUV, Sedan, Truck) of the vehicle.']
  vehicle_model_code varchar [note: 'Internal code representing the vehicle model.']
  vehicle_model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle for which the cost is recorded.']

  Note: 'Standard and actual manufacturing cost record capturing the cost breakdown for vehicle production by plant, production order, vehicle line, and model year (MY). Captures material cost, direct labor cost, variable overhead, fixed overhead, tooling amortization, energy cost, scrap cost, and total standard cost vs actual cost variance. Aligned with SAP CO-PC (Product Cost Controlling) and production order settlement. Supports vehicle profitability analysis, EBITDA reporting, and cost reduction program tracking.'
}

Table finance.warranty_reserve {
  warranty_reserve_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the warranty reserve record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Link warranty reserve to cost_center master for cost tracking.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Link warranty reserve to profit_center master for profitability analysis.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vehicle (or vehicle model) to which the reserve is linked.']
  accounting_period varchar [note: 'Financial reporting period (quarter or full year) for the reserve.']
  accrual_basis varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate the reserve (e.g., based on units sold, a fixed percentage, or a fixed amount).']
  actuarial_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent actuarial assessment of reserve adequacy.']
  audit_trail_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes capturing audit comments or justification for reserve adjustments.']
  claims_charged decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cumulative amount of warranty claims that have been charged against the reserve.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the reserve record was initially created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the reserve amounts.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the warranty reserve becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the warranty reserve is expected to be closed or expire (nullable).']
  estimated_cost_per_unit decimal(12,4) [note: 'Estimated warranty cost per vehicle unit used in the accrual calculation.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the reserve amount is allocated.']
  is_ifrs_compliant boolean [note: 'True if the reserve calculation follows IFRS warranty liability standards.']
  is_sox_controlled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reserve is subject to Sarbanes‑Oxley internal control requirements.']
  last_actuarial_update_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent actuarial model update affecting the reserve.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code representing the market region of the reserve.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle for which the warranty reserve is calculated.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reserve must be disclosed in regulatory filings (e.g., SEC, IFRS).']
  reserve_adequacy_ratio decimal(5,2) [note: 'Ratio of reserve balance to estimated total warranty liability, expressed as a percentage.']
  reserve_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total accrued liability amount for the warranty reserve before any claims are charged.']
  reserve_balance decimal(18,2) [note: 'Remaining liability balance after claims have been deducted from the reserve.']
  reserve_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the reserve purpose, scope, or special conditions.']
  reserve_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the warranty reserve for tracking and reporting.']
  reserve_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the reserve entry (initial accrual, subsequent adjustment, or reversal).']
  units_sold varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles sold in the relevant period that drive the accrual calculation.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the reserve record.']
  vehicle_line varchar [note: 'Name of the vehicle model line to which the reserve applies.']
  warranty_claims_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total monetary amount of warranty claims charged to the reserve (duplicate of claims_charged for reporting granularity).']
  warranty_claims_count varchar [note: 'Number of warranty claims that have been processed against this reserve.']
  warranty_reserve_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the reserve (e.g., active, closed, adjusted, pending review).']
  warranty_type varchar [note: 'Category of warranty coverage (e.g., basic, powertrain, EV battery, extended).']

  Note: 'Warranty financial reserve record capturing accrued warranty liability provisions by vehicle line, model year (MY), market region, and warranty type (basic, powertrain, EV battery). Captures reserve amount, currency, accrual basis (units sold × estimated cost per unit), actual warranty claims charged against reserve, reserve balance, reserve adequacy ratio, and actuarial review date. Supports IFRS/GAAP warranty liability disclosure, SOX controls, and after-sales financial planning.'
}

Table finance.finance_inventory_valuation {
  finance_inventory_valuation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the finance_inventory_valuation data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Reference cost_center master from inventory valuation for accurate valuation reporting.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Add FK to gl_account for inventory valuation accounting linkage.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Reference profit_center master from inventory valuation.']

  Note: 'Inventory valuation record capturing the financial value of raw materials, WIP (Work in Progress), finished vehicles, and service parts inventory at plant and storage location level. Aligned with SAP MM-IM material valuation and FI-MM integration. Captures material number, plant, storage location, valuation class, valuation method (standard cost, moving average), quantity on hand, unit cost, total inventory value, currency, and period-end valuation date. Supports balance sheet inventory disclosure and IFRS/GAAP compliance.'
}

Table finance.fixed_asset {
  fixed_asset_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the fixed asset record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party that legally owns the asset.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party that legally owns the asset.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant where the asset is located.']
  accumulated_depreciation decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total depreciation expense recorded to date for the asset.']
  acquisition_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Original cost incurred to acquire the asset, recorded in the functional currency.']
  acquisition_date date [note: 'Date the asset was acquired or placed into service.']
  asset_class varchar [note: 'Classification of the asset according to the company\'s asset class hierarchy (e.g., machinery, building, IT equipment).']
  asset_condition varchar [note: 'Current physical condition of the asset.']
  asset_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the asset, including purpose and key characteristics.']
  asset_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the asset.']
  asset_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the asset.']
  asset_tag varchar [note: 'Internal asset tag or number used for tracking the asset within the organization.']
  asset_type varchar [note: 'Specific type of asset within its class (e.g., stamping press, paint shop robot, battery assembly line).']
  capitalized_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cost has been capitalized (true) or expensed (false).']
  condition_rating varchar [note: 'Numeric rating (1‑5) of the asset’s condition, where 5 is best.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center to which the asset’s expenses are charged.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the asset record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the acquisition cost.']
  depreciation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate depreciation (e.g., straight‑line, declining balance, units of production).']
  depreciation_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Annual depreciation rate expressed as a percentage.']
  depreciation_start_date date [note: 'Date when depreciation calculations begin for the asset.']
  disposal_method varchar [note: 'Method used to dispose of the asset (e.g., sale, scrap, donation).']
  insurance_coverage_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary amount covered by the insurance policy.']
  insurance_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the insurance coverage expires.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Policy number of the insurance covering the asset.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent inspection or audit of the asset.']
  location_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the specific physical location (e.g., warehouse, line, bay) of the asset.']
  maintenance_schedule varchar [note: 'Reference to the maintenance plan applicable to the asset.']
  manufacturer varchar [note: 'Name of the company that manufactured the asset.']
  model varchar [note: 'Model designation or number assigned by the manufacturer.']
  net_book_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current carrying amount of the asset (acquisition cost minus accumulated depreciation).']
  next_inspection_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next scheduled inspection.']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Department accountable for the asset’s operation and maintenance.']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date the asset was officially retired from service.']
  serial_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturer‑assigned serial number uniquely identifying the physical unit.']
  tax_depreciation_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Depreciation amount recognized for tax reporting purposes.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the asset record.']
  useful_life_years varchar [note: 'Estimated economic life of the asset expressed in years for depreciation purposes.']
  vin varchar [note: 'Unique 17‑character identifier for vehicle assets, conforming to ISO 3779.']
  warranty_end_date date [note: 'Date when the asset warranty period expires.']
  warranty_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the party providing the warranty for the asset.']
  warranty_start_date date [note: 'Date when the asset warranty period begins.']

  Note: 'Fixed asset master record for all capitalized assets including manufacturing machinery, production tooling, dies, stamping presses, paint shop equipment, EV battery assembly lines, plant buildings, and IT infrastructure. Aligned with SAP FI-AA (Asset Accounting). Captures asset class, asset description, acquisition date, acquisition cost, useful life, depreciation method (straight-line, declining balance), accumulated depreciation, net book value, plant assignment, cost center, and retirement date. Supports CapEx tracking and IFRS/GAAP asset disclosure.'
}

Table finance.depreciation_run {
  depreciation_run_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the depreciation run.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Depreciation runs are executed by a finance employee; creator employee ID required for control.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the GL account to which depreciation is posted.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Code of the legal entity/company for which the depreciation run is performed.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the depreciation posting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the depreciation run record was first created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code of the posted depreciation amounts.']
  depreciation_area varchar [note: 'Depreciation area indicating the accounting book (e.g., book, tax, IFRS, statutory).']
  depreciation_end_date date [note: 'Latest asset acquisition date considered in the run.']
  depreciation_method varchar [note: 'Accounting method used for calculating depreciation in this run.']
  depreciation_start_date date [note: 'Earliest asset acquisition date considered in the run.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (e.g., month or quarter) of the depreciation run.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the depreciation run belongs.']
  is_test_run boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the run was a test (true) or production (false).']
  number_of_assets_processed varchar [note: 'Count of fixed assets included in the depreciation run.']
  posting_document_number varchar [note: 'General Ledger document number generated by the depreciation posting.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit center linked to the depreciation run for profitability analysis.']
  remarks varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text comments or notes about the depreciation run.']
  run_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the depreciation run (e.g., AFAB2023Q1).']
  run_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the depreciation run.']
  run_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the depreciation run was executed.']
  run_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the run (periodic, year‑end, or ad‑hoc).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating ERP system for the run (e.g., SAP FI‑AA).']
  status_detail varchar [note: 'Free‑text field providing additional information about the run status (e.g., error messages).']
  total_depreciation_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate depreciation amount posted by the run.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the depreciation run record.']

  Note: 'Periodic depreciation run transaction record capturing the execution of planned depreciation for fixed assets within a fiscal period. Aligned with SAP FI-AA depreciation posting run (AFAB). Captures run date, fiscal year, fiscal period, company code, depreciation area (book, tax, IFRS), total depreciation posted, number of assets processed, run status, and GL posting document reference. Supports period-end close, asset accounting reconciliation, and EBITDA calculation (depreciation add-back).'
}

Table finance.intercompany_settlement {
  intercompany_settlement_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the intercompany settlement record.']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Intercompany settlement approval is performed by a finance employee; link records that approver.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the settlement for internal reporting.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'GL account used for posting the settlement.']
  intercompany_group_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the intercompany group for consolidation purposes.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Profit center linked to the settlement for profitability analysis.']
  related_loan_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of an intercompany loan related to this settlement, if applicable.']
  amount_gross decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount before taxes, fees, or adjustments.']
  amount_net decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net amount after taxes and adjustments.']
  amount_tax decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component associated with the settlement.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the settlement was approved.']
  clearing_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the clearing document generated for the settlement.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional comments or remarks entered by users.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the settlement record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the settlement amount.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the settlement terms become effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date until which the settlement terms remain effective (nullable for open‑ended).']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Currency exchange rate applied when converting to the reporting currency.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (e.g., month or quarter) of the settlement.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the settlement belongs.']
  intercompany_settlement_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description or notes about the settlement.']
  intercompany_settlement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the settlement (e.g., draft, posted, cleared).']
  is_approved boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the settlement has been approved.']
  netting_indicator boolean [note: 'True if the settlement amount is netted against other intercompany balances.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the settlement was posted to the general ledger.']
  receiving_company_code varchar [note: 'Organizational code of the legal entity receiving the settlement amount.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Status of the settlement reconciliation process.']
  sending_company_code varchar [note: 'Organizational code of the legal entity sending the settlement amount.']
  settlement_number varchar [note: 'Business-visible settlement number assigned by the finance system.']
  settlement_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the settlement (e.g., transfer pricing, service charge, royalty).']
  source_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the source document (e.g., invoice) that generated the settlement.']
  target_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the target document (e.g., receiving invoice) linked to the settlement.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used to determine tax treatment for the settlement.']
  transaction_date date [note: 'Date on which the intercompany transaction was recorded.']
  transfer_price_basis varchar [note: 'Methodology used to calculate the transfer price (cost, market, list, or custom).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the settlement record.']

  Note: 'Intercompany settlement transaction record capturing financial transactions between legal entities within the Automotive group, including transfer pricing for CKD/SKD kits, shared service charges, royalty payments, management fee allocations, and intercompany loans. Captures sending company code, receiving company code, settlement type, settlement amount, currency, transfer price basis, netting indicator, clearing document reference, and reconciliation status. Supports intercompany elimination in group consolidation and IFRS/GAAP compliance.'
}

Table finance.cost_allocation {
  cost_allocation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each cost allocation transaction record.']
  allocation_cycle_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the periodic allocation cycle (e.g., KSV5/KSU5 run ID).']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Cost allocation entries need creator employee for audit trail and compliance.']
  activity_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Quantity of the activity (e.g., machine hours, labor hours) used for activity‑based allocation.']
  allocated_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount that is allocated from sender to receiver.']
  allocation_date date [note: 'Date on which the allocation was calculated.']
  allocation_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate the allocation (fixed % , activity‑based, or statistical key figure).']
  allocation_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage applied when the allocation method is fixed_percentage.']
  cost_allocation_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the purpose or notes for the allocation.']
  cost_allocation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the allocation record.']
  cost_element_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the type of cost (e.g., material, labor, overhead).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the allocation record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code of the allocated amount.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Start date when the allocation becomes effective (used for future‑dated allocations).']
  effective_until date [note: 'End date when the allocation ceases to be effective; null for open‑ended allocations.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Period code within the fiscal year (e.g., Q1, Q2, M03).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year to which the allocation belongs.']
  is_intercompany boolean [note: 'True if the allocation crosses legal entity boundaries.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the allocation was posted to the general ledger.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit center associated with the receiving cost center, if applicable.']
  receiver_cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center that receives the allocated overhead cost.']
  sender_cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center that provides the overhead cost to be allocated.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record that generated the allocation (e.g., SAP CO).']
  statistical_key_value decimal(15,3) [note: 'Value of the statistical key figure (e.g., production volume) used for allocation.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the allocation record.']

  Note: 'Cost allocation and assessment cycle transaction record capturing the periodic redistribution of overhead costs from service cost centers (maintenance, utilities, HR, IT) to production cost centers and profit centers. Aligned with SAP CO assessment and distribution cycles (KSV5/KSU5). Captures allocation cycle ID, fiscal period, sender cost center, receiver cost center/profit center, allocation method (fixed percentage, activity-based, statistical key figure), allocated amount, and currency. Supports accurate vehicle manufacturing cost calculation.'
}

Table finance.tax_posting {
  tax_posting_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each tax posting record.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Replace string GL account reference with FK to gl_account for tax posting.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent financial transaction (invoice, credit memo, etc.) to which this tax posting belongs.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the tax posting record was initially created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Period number within the fiscal year (e.g., 1‑12).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year to which the posting belongs.']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential order of the tax posting line within the parent transaction.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date on which the tax posting was recorded in the ledger.']
  source_document_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the originating document (invoice, credit memo, etc.) that generated this tax posting.']
  source_document_type varchar [note: 'Type of the originating document.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Calculated tax amount for the posting.']
  tax_base_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount on which the tax is calculated.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the specific tax rule applied (e.g., VAT001, EXC002).']
  tax_exempt_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the transaction is tax‑exempt (true) or taxable (false).']
  tax_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or regulatory jurisdiction governing the tax (e.g., state, country, EU).']
  tax_posting_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the tax posting (e.g., reason, notes).']
  tax_posting_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the tax posting.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate expressed as a percentage (e.g., 19.00).']
  tax_rate_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the tax rate applied (standard, reduced, zero, or special).']
  tax_reporting_period varchar [note: 'Period identifier used for tax authority reporting (e.g., Q1‑2024).']
  tax_return_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the tax return or filing to which this posting contributes.']
  tax_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the tax (input VAT, output VAT, withholding tax, excise duty).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the tax posting record.']

  Note: 'Tax posting record capturing VAT, sales tax, withholding tax, and excise duty transactions associated with vendor invoices, customer invoices, and intercompany transactions. Captures tax code, tax type (input/output VAT, withholding, excise), tax base amount, tax amount, currency, tax jurisdiction, reporting period, tax return reference, and GL account. Supports indirect tax compliance, tax return preparation, and regulatory reporting to EPA/DOT/CARB for excise-related levies.'
}

Table finance.accrual {
  accrual_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the accrual record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the cost center bearing the accrual expense.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Accrual creation must be linked to the responsible employee for audit and SOX compliance.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the GL account to which the accrual amount is posted.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the profit center associated with the accrual.']
  related_dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer linked to the accrual (e.g., dealer incentive).']
  related_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer linked to the accrual (e.g., dealer incentive).']
  related_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the project (e.g., R&D, tooling) linked to the accrual.']
  related_vehicle_vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vehicle (VIN) associated with the accrual, if any.']
  accrual_date date [note: 'Date the accrual is recognized for accounting purposes.']
  accrual_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description providing context for the accrual.']
  accrual_number varchar [note: 'External business number or code assigned to the accrual.']
  accrual_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the accrual.']
  accrual_type varchar [note: 'Category of the accrual representing the underlying financial obligation.']
  amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the accrual in the transaction currency.']
  audit_user varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who performed the last audit on the accrual.']
  basis varchar [note: 'Methodology used to calculate the accrual amount.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the accrual record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the accrual amount.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Period identifier (e.g., Q1, M03) within the fiscal year.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year to which the accrual belongs.']
  is_manual boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the accrual was entered manually (true) or generated automatically (false).']
  is_tax_relevant boolean [note: 'Indicates if the accrual amount is subject to tax.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the accrual.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the fiscal period for which the accrual is recorded.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the accrual is posted to the ledger.']
  reversal_date date [note: 'Date on which the accrual is reversed, if applicable.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that generated the accrual (e.g., SAP FI).']
  supporting_document_ref varchar [note: 'Reference number of the supporting document (e.g., invoice, contract).']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component of the accrual, if applicable.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax code used to determine tax rate for the accrual.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the accrual record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the accrual record.']

  Note: 'Period-end accrual and prepayment record capturing estimated financial obligations and deferred costs that must be recognized in the correct fiscal period per IFRS/GAAP matching principle. Includes warranty accruals, rebate accruals, bonus provisions, tooling amortization accruals, and dealer incentive accruals. Captures accrual type, accrual amount, currency, accrual basis, GL account, cost center, fiscal period, reversal date, and supporting documentation reference. Critical for accurate FY close and SOX compliance.'
}

Table finance.currency_rate {
  currency_rate_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each currency rate record.']
  company_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.company_code. Business justification: Currency rates are maintained per legal entity; linking to company_code provides context and eliminates the isolated lookup table.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Organizational code of the legal entity to which the rate applies.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the currency rate record was first created in the system.']
  currency_from varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency being converted from.']
  currency_rate_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text providing additional context or notes about the rate (e.g., special market conditions).']
  currency_to varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency being converted to.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year (e.g., 2024) associated with the rate record for reporting purposes.']
  is_historical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the rate is a historical record (true) or a current/forecast rate (false).']
  period varchar [note: 'Two‑digit period identifier (e.g., month) within the fiscal year.']
  rate_date date [note: 'Calendar date to which the exchange rate applies (e.g., daily rate).']
  rate_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the rate: spot, average, period‑end, or planning.']
  rate_value decimal(18,6) [note: 'Numeric exchange rate value expressed as the amount of target currency per one unit of source currency.']
  source varchar [note: 'Origin of the rate data, such as European Central Bank, Bloomberg, or internal treasury.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the currency rate record.']
  valid_from date [note: 'Start date of the period during which the rate is valid.']
  valid_to date [note: 'End date of the period during which the rate is valid; null if open‑ended.']

  Note: 'Foreign exchange (FX) currency rate reference record capturing daily, monthly average, and period-end exchange rates used for multi-currency financial reporting and transaction conversion. Captures currency pair (from/to), rate type (spot, average, period-end, planning), valid date, exchange rate, rate source (ECB, Bloomberg, internal treasury), and company code applicability. Supports IFRS translation of foreign subsidiary financials, transaction currency conversion, and FX exposure reporting.'
}

Table finance.wbs_element {
  wbs_element_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the WBS element.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the cost center entity linked to this WBS element.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or manager accountable for this WBS element.']
  parent_wbs_wbs_element_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the immediate parent WBS element, establishing the hierarchy.']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant associated with the WBS element.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'FK to finance.profit_center']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the overarching project definition to which this WBS element belongs.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: WBS elements representing project work need a FK to the regulatory requirement they address for compliance reporting.']
  responsible_person_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or manager accountable for this WBS element.']
  accounting_status varchar [note: 'Accounting posting status of the WBS element.']
  actual_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Incurred cost amount recorded to date for the WBS element.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the WBS element received final approval.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval workflow status.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Approved budget amount for the WBS element, may differ from planned cost.']
  committed_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost commitments (e.g., purchase orders) associated with the WBS element.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the WBS record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary amounts.']
  end_date date [note: 'Planned or actual completion date of the WBS element.']
  external_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to external systems (e.g., ERP document number).']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period code (e.g., Q1, Q2) for reporting.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the WBS element\'s financials are assigned.']
  investment_program_code varchar [note: 'Code linking the WBS element to a corporate investment program (e.g., new model launch, plant expansion).']
  is_capex boolean [note: 'True if the element captures capital expenditure, false otherwise.']
  is_r_and_d boolean [note: 'True if the element is part of research & development projects.']
  milestone_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the WBS element represents a project milestone.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or remarks about the WBS element.']
  planned_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Budgeted cost amount originally planned for the WBS element.']
  plant_location varchar [note: 'Geographic location or site name of the plant.']
  project_phase varchar [note: 'Current phase of the overall project to which the WBS element belongs.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Version number of the WBS element record.']
  start_date date [note: 'Effective start date when the WBS element becomes active.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the WBS record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the WBS record.']
  wbs_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the WBS element, typically used in SAP PS and project documentation.']
  wbs_element_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the WBS element.']
  wbs_hierarchy_path varchar [note: 'Delimited path representing the full hierarchy (e.g., 1.2.3).']
  wbs_level varchar [note: 'Hierarchical level of the element within the WBS tree (1 = top level).']
  wbs_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the WBS element.']
  wbs_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the WBS element by business purpose.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the WBS record.']

  Note: 'Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) element master record used for project-based cost tracking including CapEx projects, new model launch programs (SOP/EOP), EV/autonomous R&D programs, and plant expansion projects. Aligned with SAP PS (Project System). Captures WBS code, project definition, WBS level, responsible cost center, planned cost, actual cost, committed cost, project status, start/end dates, and investment program linkage. Enables granular CapEx spend tracking and R&D capitalization under IFRS IAS 38.'
}

Table finance.financial_period_close {
  financial_period_close_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each financial period close record.']
  approver_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who signed off the close task.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who signed off the close task.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Date the close task was actually completed.']
  approver_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the employee who approved the close task.']
  blocking_issue_description varchar [note: 'Text describing any issue that prevented the task from progressing.']
  close_event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the primary event that marks the execution of the close task.']
  close_task_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier for the close task, used in reporting and audit trails.']
  close_task_type varchar [note: 'Category of the period‑end activity (e.g., depreciation run, accrual posting, intercompany reconciliation).']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center associated with the task for internal cost allocation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'When the financial period close record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for monetary values.']
  financial_period_close_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the close task.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Period identifier within the fiscal year (e.g., Q1, M03).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Four‑digit fiscal year to which the close task belongs.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total monetary amount before deductions for the close activity.']
  is_audit_evidence boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the record serves as evidence for SOX or other audits.']
  lock_flag boolean [note: 'True when the fiscal period is locked after successful close.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final monetary value after tax and other adjustments.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form comments or observations related to the close task.']
  planned_completion_date date [note: 'Target date by which the close task should be finished.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit center linked to the task for profitability reporting.']
  responsible_team varchar [note: 'Organizational team accountable for executing the close task.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that originated the record (e.g., SAP S/4HANA).']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component associated with the gross amount, if applicable.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Most recent time the record was modified.']

  Note: 'Financial period-end close task and status record tracking the completion of all period-end close activities required before a fiscal period can be locked. Captures close task type (depreciation run, accrual posting, intercompany reconciliation, inventory valuation, FX revaluation, cost allocation), responsible team, planned completion date, actual completion date, status (pending, in-progress, completed, blocked), blocking issues, and sign-off approver. Supports FY close governance, SOX control evidence, and audit readiness.'
}

Table finance.dealer_incentive {
  dealer_incentive_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the dealer incentive record.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Dealer incentive programs are created by a finance employee; creator ID required for governance.']
  dealer_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the dealer receiving the incentive.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the dealer receiving the incentive.']
  accounting_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (e.g., FY2025) to which the incentive expense is allocated.']
  accrual_basis varchar [note: 'Accounting basis used for recognizing the incentive (cash or accrual).']
  actual_payment_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount that has been paid to the dealer for the incentive.']
  actual_units_accrued varchar [note: 'Number of units that have actually accrued incentive eligibility.']
  audit_user varchar [note: 'User who performed the most recent audit or approval of the incentive record.']
  budget_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the budget used for the incentive program.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the incentive record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary amounts.']
  dealer_incentive_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the incentive program purpose and rules.']
  dealer_incentive_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the incentive program.']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Textual description of the criteria dealers must meet to qualify.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date when the incentive program expires or is terminated.']
  gl_account_code varchar [note: 'GL account to which the incentive expense is posted.']
  incentive_amount_per_unit decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary amount awarded per eligible vehicle unit.']
  incentive_category varchar [note: 'Higher‑level category of the incentive (e.g., new_vehicle, electric).']
  is_taxable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incentive amount is subject to tax.']
  max_units varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicle units for which the incentive can be applied.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle eligible for the incentive.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Supplementary remarks or comments related to the incentive.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Scheduled date on which the incentive payment is made to the dealer.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to remit the incentive payment to the dealer.']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number for the payment transaction.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the incentive payment.']
  payment_trigger_threshold decimal(15,2) [note: 'Numeric threshold value for the payment trigger (units, percentage, or score).']
  payment_trigger_type varchar [note: 'Mechanism that triggers incentive payment (e.g., volume threshold).']
  program_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the incentive program.']
  program_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the incentive program offered to dealers.']
  program_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the incentive program (e.g., volume bonus, holdback).']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter region code where the dealer operates.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date when the incentive program becomes effective.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate percentage when the incentive is taxable.']
  total_budget decimal(15,2) [note: 'Maximum total monetary budget allocated for the program.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last updated the incentive record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the incentive record.']
  vehicle_line varchar [note: 'Vehicle product line (e.g., sedan, SUV) to which the incentive applies.']

  Note: 'Dealer financial incentive and sales program record capturing monetary incentives, volume bonuses, holdback payments, floor plan assistance, and marketing co-op funds issued to dealers. Captures incentive program type, dealer ID, vehicle line, model year (MY), incentive amount per unit, total program budget, accrual basis, payment trigger (volume threshold, OTD performance, NPS score), payment date, and GL account. Supports dealer network profitability management, MSRP-to-net revenue reconciliation, and sales incentive cost accounting.'
}

Table finance.vehicle_profitability {
  vehicle_profitability_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each vehicle profitability record.']
  customer_party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the end‑customer who purchased the vehicle.']
  dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer that sold the vehicle.']
  homologation_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.homologation_record. Business justification: Regulatory cost allocation in vehicle profitability reports requires linking each vehicle\'s profitability line to its homologation approval record.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: Profitability analysis per model requires linking each profitability record to the vehicle model entity for aggregating costs and revenues by model.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the end‑customer who purchased the vehicle.']
  primary_vehicle_dealership_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dealer that sold the vehicle.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vin_registry. Business justification: Profitability reports per vehicle need to associate each record with the VIN registry to pull vehicle details for compliance and warranty cost allocation.']
  actual_manufacturing_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Real cost incurred for material, labor, and overhead.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center responsible for manufacturing cost allocation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the profitability record was created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.']
  ebitda_contribution decimal(18,2) [note: 'Vehicle-level contribution to EBITDA after allocating fixed overhead.']
  emission_rating varchar [note: 'Regulatory emissions classification (e.g., EPA Tier 3).']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter or period identifier.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year in which the transaction is recorded.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary propulsion technology of the vehicle.']
  gross_margin decimal(18,2) [note: 'Difference between gross revenue and standard manufacturing cost.']
  gross_revenue_msrp decimal(18,2) [note: 'Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price before any discounts or incentives.']
  incentive_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary incentive provided to the dealer for this sale.']
  is_eligible_for_subsidy boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the vehicle qualifies for government subsidies.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region (e.g., NA, EU, APAC).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the vehicle model was produced.']
  net_contribution_margin decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net revenue minus all variable costs and warranty reserve.']
  net_revenue decimal(18,2) [note: 'Revenue after dealer incentives, discounts, and taxes.']
  plant_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant where the vehicle was assembled.']
  profit_center_code varchar [note: 'Profit center used for revenue attribution.']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the vehicle was sold.']
  selling_distribution_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Costs associated with sales, logistics, and dealer commissions.']
  standard_manufacturing_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned cost based on standard BOM and routing.']
  subsidy_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value of any applicable subsidy.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Taxes applied to the net revenue.']
  transaction_date date [note: 'Date the vehicle sale and profitability calculation occurred.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  vehicle_category varchar [note: 'Business segment classification of the vehicle.']
  vehicle_height_mm varchar [note: 'Overall height of the vehicle in millimetres.']
  vehicle_length_mm varchar [note: 'Overall length of the vehicle in millimetres.']
  vehicle_line varchar [note: 'Model line or family (e.g., SUV, Truck, Sedan).']
  vehicle_profitability_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the profitability record.']
  vehicle_weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Curb weight of the vehicle in kilograms.']
  vehicle_width_mm varchar [note: 'Overall width of the vehicle in millimetres.']
  warranty_miles varchar [note: 'Maximum mileage covered by the warranty.']
  warranty_reserve_charge decimal(18,2) [note: 'Provision for future warranty claims allocated to this vehicle.']
  warranty_years varchar [note: 'Length of the standard warranty in years.']

  Note: 'Vehicle-level profitability record capturing the contribution margin and net profitability for each vehicle unit sold, by VIN, vehicle line, plant, market region, and sales channel. Captures gross revenue (MSRP), net revenue (after dealer incentives and discounts), standard manufacturing cost, actual manufacturing cost, gross margin, selling and distribution cost, warranty reserve charge, and net contribution margin. Supports EBITDA reporting by vehicle line/plant/region and management accounting for product portfolio decisions.'
}

Table finance.project {
  project_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for project']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the executive sponsor for the project.']
  manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee managing day‑to‑day execution.']
  parent_project_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on project (parent_project_id)']
  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant associated with the project.']
  actual_end_date date [note: 'Actual date the project was closed or completed.']
  actual_spend decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cumulative actual expenditures incurred by the project.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the project received formal approval.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who approved the project budget.']
  audit_comments varchar [note: 'Free‑text comments from auditors regarding the project.']
  audit_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the SOX audit for the project.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Original approved budget for the project.']
  capital_expenditure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the project is classified as CapEx.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Financial cost center responsible for the project.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code for the project location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the project record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values.']
  expected_roi_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Projected return on investment expressed as a percentage.']
  external_project_number varchar [note: 'Identifier used by external partners or regulatory bodies.']
  forecasted_total_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Projected total cost at project completion.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the funds used for the project.']
  operational_expenditure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the project is classified as OpEx.']
  phase varchar [note: 'Current phase of the project lifecycle.']
  planned_end_date date [note: 'Planned completion date of the project.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the project.']
  project_category varchar [note: 'High‑level business category for the project.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'External business code used to identify the project in finance and reporting systems.']
  project_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the project\'s purpose, scope, and objectives.']
  project_location varchar [note: 'Physical location or site where the project is executed.']
  project_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the project as used by business users.']
  project_phase_end_date date [note: 'Planned end date of the current project phase.']
  project_phase_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the current project phase.']
  project_status_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for the current status, e.g., reason for hold or cancellation.']
  project_subcategory varchar [note: 'More granular classification within the project category.']
  project_type varchar [note: 'Category of the project indicating its primary nature.']
  region varchar [note: 'Broad geographic region of the project.']
  revised_budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Updated budget after revisions.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk level for the project.']
  sox_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the project is subject to SOX internal controls.']
  start_date date [note: 'Planned start date of the project.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the project.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the project record.']
  variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Difference between revised budget and actual spend.']
  variance_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage variance between revised budget and actual spend.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for project. Referenced by related_project_id.'
}

Table finance.payment_settlement {
  payment_settlement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for payment_settlement']
  counterparty_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external party (vendor, customer, partner) involved in the settlement.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the invoice that this settlement settles.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the purchase order associated with the settlement.']
  reversed_payment_settlement_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on payment_settlement (reversed_payment_settlement_id)']
  adjustment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of taxes, fees, discounts, or other adjustments applied to the gross amount.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the batch run that processed this settlement.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Internal cost center to which the settlement expense is charged.']
  counterparty_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the counterparty involved in the settlement.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the settlement record was first created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the settlement.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the purpose or context of the settlement.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Discount component subtracted from the gross amount.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert from original currency to settlement currency, if applicable.']
  fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fee component included in the adjustment amount.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount before any adjustments, in the settlement currency.']
  is_cross_border boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the settlement involves parties in different countries.']
  is_manual_settlement boolean [note: 'True if the settlement was entered manually rather than via automated process.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount transferred after adjustments, in the settlement currency.']
  original_currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency code of the original transaction before conversion.']
  payment_reference varchar [note: 'External reference supplied by the payer or payee for tracking.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'Project identifier linked to the settlement for project‑level accounting.']
  reconciliation_date date [note: 'Date when the settlement was reconciled.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the financial reconciliation for this settlement.']
  settlement_approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the settlement was approved.']
  settlement_approved_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who approved the settlement.']
  settlement_batch_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequence number of the settlement within its processing batch.']
  settlement_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the settlement purpose.']
  settlement_channel varchar [note: 'Interface or process through which the settlement was initiated.']
  settlement_comment varchar [note: 'Additional comments or notes entered by users.']
  settlement_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the settlement record.']
  settlement_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the settlement is expected to be completed.']
  settlement_external_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier used by external parties (e.g., bank reference).']
  settlement_legal_entity_code varchar [note: 'Code of the legal entity within the enterprise that owns the settlement.']
  settlement_method varchar [note: 'Payment instrument used for the settlement.']
  settlement_number varchar [note: 'External business reference number assigned to the settlement.']
  settlement_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level for processing the settlement.']
  settlement_processed_date date [note: 'Date on which the settlement was actually processed.']
  settlement_reason_code varchar [note: 'Code indicating the business reason for the settlement (e.g., invoice_payment, tax_refund).']
  settlement_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system (e.g., SAP, Oracle) that originated the settlement record.']
  settlement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the settlement.']
  settlement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the settlement was executed in the business process.']
  settlement_type varchar [note: 'Direction of cash flow for the settlement.']
  settlement_version varchar [note: 'Version number for optimistic concurrency control.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component included in the adjustment amount.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the settlement record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for payment_settlement. Referenced by payment_settlement_id.'
}

Table finance.intercompany_group {
