Table workforce.training_course {
  training_course_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_course']
  competency_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the competency framework element that the course addresses.']
  prerequisite_course_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a prerequisite course that must be completed before enrolling.']
  prerequisite_training_course_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on training_course (prerequisite_training_course_id)']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'External organization that accredits the course, if any.']
  assessment_method varchar [note: 'Specific approach used for assessment (e.g., multiple‑choice, practical demo).']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Method used to evaluate learner competence.']
  category varchar [note: 'Classification of the course by business domain or competency area.']
  certification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether successful completion grants a formal certification.']
  code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or catalogue code used to reference the course.']
  compliance_requirements varchar [note: 'Regulatory or internal standards the course satisfies (e.g., IATF 16949, OSHA).']
  cost decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary cost to the organization for delivering the course.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the course record was first created in the system.']
  credit_hours decimal(4,2) [note: 'Number of credit hours awarded upon successful completion.']
  currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the course cost.']
  delivery_method varchar [note: 'Primary method used to deliver the training (online, in‑person, or blended).']
  department varchar [note: 'Organizational department that owns or sponsors the course.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the objectives, content, and outcomes of the course.']
  duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total instructional time allocated to the course, expressed in hours.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date after which the course is no longer offered (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the course becomes available for enrollment.']
  enrollment_deadline date [note: 'Last date on which employees may register for the course.']
  equipment_needed varchar [note: 'List of equipment or tools required for participants.']
  evaluation_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average score recorded for the course across all participants.']
  feedback_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether participants must submit feedback after completion.']
  instructor_email varchar [note: 'Contact email of the primary instructor.']
  instructor_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the primary instructor delivering the course.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the course is required for the target audience.']
  language varchar [note: 'Two‑letter ISO code of the language in which the course is delivered.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the course content was last reviewed for relevance and compliance.']
  location varchar [note: 'Physical site or facility where in‑person sessions are held.']
  max_participants varchar [note: 'Maximum number of learners allowed to enroll in a single session.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable title of the training course.']
  pass_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum score (percentage) required to pass the assessment.']
  room_number varchar [note: 'Specific room or hall identifier for the in‑person session.']
  skill_tags varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of skill keywords associated with the course.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the course.']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Primary employee group(s) for which the course is intended.']
  training_materials_url varchar [note: 'Web address where course materials (slides, docs) are stored.']
  training_provider varchar [note: 'Entity (internal department or external vendor) that delivers the course.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the course record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the course content (e.g., v1.2).']
  video_url varchar [note: 'Link to any video content associated with the course.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for training_course. Referenced by course_id.'
}

Table compliance.homologation_record {
  homologation_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the homologation record.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: Homologation records certify a specific vehicle model for market approval; FK to model ties approvals to the correct model definition.']
  approval_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the homologation approval.']
  approval_number varchar [note: 'Official approval number or certificate identifier issued by the regulatory authority.']
  approval_status_date date [note: 'Date when the current status was assigned to the approval.']
  approval_type varchar [note: 'Category of the approval (e.g., type approval, certification, test, homologation).']
  body_style varchar [note: 'Exterior body configuration.']
  certification_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the electronic copy of the certification document.']
  co2_emissions_g_per_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured CO2 emissions in grams per kilometer.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes regarding special conditions, exemptions, or observations.']
  document_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the certification document.']
  drivetrain varchar [note: 'Drive configuration of the vehicle.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the approval is effective for sales.']
  engine_code varchar [note: 'Manufacturer\'s internal engine identifier.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the approval expires or must be renewed.']
  fuel_consumption_l_per_100km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured fuel consumption in liters per 100 kilometers.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary fuel used by the powertrain.']
  homologation_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the homologation record.']
  market_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the market where the approval applies.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region grouping of markets.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the vehicle model was first produced.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the homologation record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the homologation record.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Authority that issued the approval.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the regulatory filing or decision.']
  test_cycle varchar [note: 'Regulatory test cycle used for emissions and fuel consumption testing.']
  test_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulatory test was performed.']
  test_lab varchar [note: 'Name of the accredited laboratory that performed the test.']
  transmission_type varchar [note: 'Type of transmission fitted to the vehicle.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who last modified the record.']
  vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Manufacturer‑defined model designation (e.g., Camry, F‑150).']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the vehicle.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who created the record.']

  Note: 'Master record for vehicle type approval and homologation certifications across global markets. Captures UNECE type approval numbers, FMVSS homologation status, Euro NCAP ratings, WLTP certification references, and jurisdiction-specific approval details for each vehicle model and variant. Serves as the authoritative SSOT for all regulatory type approvals required before a vehicle can be sold in a given market.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_emissions_certification {
  compliance_emissions_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance_emissions_certification data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Connect emissions certifications to their governing compliance document.']
  equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to asset.equipment_registry. Business justification: Emissions certification traceability: each certification is performed on specific test equipment; linking enables audit of equipment used.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Add jurisdiction reference to emissions certifications for regional compliance tracking.']
  powertrain_variant_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.powertrain_variant. Business justification: Required for emissions certification reports that certify each specific powertrain variant, enabling traceability of emissions limits per variant.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Link emissions certifications to the regulatory requirement they satisfy.']

  Note: 'Master record for EPA, CARB, and Euro 6/7 emissions certifications issued for specific vehicle configurations and powertrain variants. Tracks certification number, applicable standard (EPA Tier 3, CARB LEV III, Euro 6d), test cycle (WLTP, FTP-75, US06), certification date, expiry, and compliance status. Covers ICE, HEV, PHEV, and EV powertrain types. Links to the specific engine family and vehicle model year program.'
}

Table compliance.cafe_compliance_record {
  cafe_compliance_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the CAFE compliance record.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Replace free‑text region with FK to jurisdiction for standardized regional reporting.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: CAFE credit calculations are performed per vehicle model; linking to model allows accurate credit tracking and reporting per model.']
  actual_cafe_mpg decimal(5,2) [note: 'Achieved Corporate Average Fuel Economy for the fleet, expressed in miles per gallon.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the regulator approved the submitted CAFE record.']
  compliance_gap_mpg decimal(5,2) [note: 'Difference between actual and required CAFE; positive indicates surplus, negative indicates shortfall.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compliance record was first created in the system.']
  credit_balance decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary value of CAFE credits carried forward or generated in the reporting period.']
  credit_expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which any banked CAFE credits expire if not used.']
  credit_type varchar [note: 'Category of CAFE credit (generated, banked for future use, already used, or expired).']
  fine_liability_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Potential monetary penalty if the compliance gap is negative and insufficient credits exist.']
  fleet_mix_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the vehicle mix (e.g., percentages of cars, trucks, hybrids).']
  fleet_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle fleet (e.g., domestic car, import car, light truck).']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the record is currently active for reporting purposes.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle fleet covered by the compliance record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the compliance record.']
  record_label varchar [note: 'Human‑readable label identifying the compliance record, typically combining model year and fleet type.']
  record_number varchar [note: 'External reference number used in regulatory filings and internal reporting.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing authority to which the CAFE data is reported.']
  reporting_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the regulatory filing process.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year in which the CAFE data is reported to regulators.']
  required_cafe_mpg decimal(5,2) [note: 'Regulatory minimum CAFE value that must be met for the given model year and fleet type.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating enterprise system that supplied the data (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, MES).']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the compliance record was submitted to the regulator.']
  total_vehicles varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles included in the fleet mix for this CAFE calculation.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the compliance record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version of the compliance record for audit tracking.']

  Note: 'Annual CAFE (Corporate Average Fuel Economy) compliance record tracking fleet-wide fuel economy performance against NHTSA-mandated standards. Captures model year, fleet type (domestic car, import car, light truck), actual achieved CAFE value (mpg), required standard, compliance gap or surplus, credit balance, and fine liability. Supports NHTSA annual CAFE reporting obligations and internal fleet mix planning.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_submission {
  regulatory_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each regulatory submission record.']
  aftersales_model_year_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.model_year_program. Business justification: REQUIRED: Each regulatory submission is filed for a specific vehicle program; linking enables submission status dashboards.']
  compliance_officer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal compliance officer responsible for the submission.']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Regulatory submissions are filed per vehicle; FK to connected_vehicle provides traceability for audit and recall.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal compliance officer responsible for the submission.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Associate each regulatory submission with the specific regulatory requirement it satisfies.']
  vin_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.vin_registry. Business justification: Regulatory submissions often reference a specific vehicle VIN; linking to vin_registry enables validation of VIN status and history for compliance reporting.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the regulatory body approved the submission.']
  cafe_value decimal(5,2) [note: 'Reported CAFE metric associated with the submission, expressed in mpg.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the submission record was first created in the system.']
  document_path varchar [note: 'File system or storage URI where the submission package is stored.']
  document_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the submitted document (e.g., v1.0).']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the submitted certification or approval becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Expiration date of the certification or approval, if applicable.']
  emission_standard varchar [note: 'Applicable emissions regulation (e.g., EPA Tier 3, Euro 6).']
  fee_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the fee.']
  fee_gross_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total fee charged before taxes or adjustments.']
  fee_net_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Net fee after tax and any discounts.']
  fee_tax_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Tax component of the submission fee.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary propulsion technology of the vehicle(s) covered.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the submission is critical for regulatory compliance.']
  is_urgent boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the submission requires expedited handling.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the market or region for which the submission is made.']
  regulatory_body_code varchar [note: 'Code of the governing body receiving the submission.']
  regulatory_body_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the regulatory authority (e.g., National Highway Traffic Safety Administration).']
  regulatory_submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the submission.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Textual explanation provided by the regulator when a submission is rejected.']
  related_part_number varchar [note: 'Part number(s) from the Bill of Materials relevant to the submission (e.g., emissions control component).']
  reviewer_comments varchar [note: 'Internal comments from the compliance reviewer regarding the submission.']
  status_change_date date [note: 'Date when the status last transitioned.']
  submission_category varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the submission is for domestic market, export market, or both.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the submission was formally sent to the regulatory authority.']
  submission_reference_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the regulatory body or internal tracking system.']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Category of the regulatory filing (e.g., type approval, recall notice).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the submission record.']
  vehicle_model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle(s) covered by the submission.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle (e.g., passenger, truck, SUV).']

  Note: 'Transactional record for each formal regulatory submission made to a governing body (NHTSA, EPA, CARB, UNECE, Euro NCAP, DOT). Captures submission type (type approval application, certificate of conformity, recall notice, CAFE report, safety standard compliance report), submission date, regulatory body, submission reference number, status (submitted, acknowledged, approved, rejected, under review), and responsible compliance officer. Central audit trail for all outbound regulatory filings.'
}

Table compliance.recall_campaign {
  recall_campaign_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance_recall_campaign data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Attach the primary compliance document to the recall campaign for audit traceability.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Link recall campaign to the regulatory requirement that triggered the recall.']

  Note: 'Master record for NHTSA safety recall campaigns and OEM-initiated service campaigns. Captures NHTSA recall number, campaign type (safety recall, emissions recall, OEM voluntary service campaign), defect description, affected population (VIN range, model year, nameplate), remedy description, campaign open date, remedy availability date, and campaign closure status. Serves as the compliance SSOT for recall management, distinct from aftersales.recall_completion which tracks dealer-level execution.'
}

Table compliance.test_event {
  test_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the compliance test event record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital test report document.']
  connected_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to mobility.connected_vehicle. Business justification: Vehicle test events are performed on specific connected vehicles; linking enables compliance test tracking per vehicle.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the technician who performed the test.']
  equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary test equipment used.']
  homologation_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the homologation record associated with this test.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Identify the obligation that the test event is validating.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Connect test events to the regulatory requirement they are designed to meet.']
  test_equipment_equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary test equipment used.']
  test_operator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the technician who performed the test.']
  ambient_humidity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Relative humidity percentage at the test site.']
  ambient_pressure_kpa decimal(6,2) [note: 'Barometric pressure at the test site in kilopascals.']
  ambient_temperature_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Ambient air temperature measured at the test site in degrees Celsius.']
  certification_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority or organization issuing the certification.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Official certification number assigned after successful test.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the regulatory certification linked to this test.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier who initially created the record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the test event record was first created in the system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system of record (e.g., SAP QM, Apriso MES).']
  is_retest boolean [note: 'True if the test is a repeat of a prior failed or conditional test.']
  measured_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the measured value (e.g., g/km, km/h, dB).']
  measured_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Primary quantitative measurement recorded (e.g., CO2 g/km, g-force).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional observations or comments.']
  pass_fail_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator where true = pass, false = fail.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle\'s powertrain (e.g., ICE, EV).']
  regulatory_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or market jurisdiction governing the test (e.g., US, EU).']
  result varchar [note: 'Overall outcome of the test (pass, fail, or conditional).']
  retest_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation why a retest was required.']
  test_batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the group of tests executed together.']
  test_category varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the test (emissions, crash safety, noise, etc.).']
  test_condition varchar [note: 'Operational condition under which the test was performed (e.g., cold start, hot start).']
  test_equipment_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the test equipment.']
  test_event_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the test event by the testing facility.']
  test_event_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the test event.']
  test_facility varchar [note: 'Name of the laboratory or proving ground where the test was conducted.']
  test_location varchar [note: 'Geographic location (city, state, country) of the test facility.']
  test_operator_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the test operator.']
  test_program varchar [note: 'Name of the specific testing program or campaign (e.g., EPA Tier 3, Euro NCAP).']
  test_sequence_number varchar [note: 'Ordinal number of the test within a batch or campaign.']
  test_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the physical compliance test was performed.']
  test_type varchar [note: 'Standardized test program or protocol applied (e.g., WLTP, NCAP).']
  updated_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier who last modified the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the test event record.']
  vehicle_model_code varchar [note: 'Internal code representing the vehicle model.']
  vehicle_model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle under test.']
  vehicle_variant varchar [note: 'Specific trim or configuration variant of the vehicle.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing each physical compliance test event conducted for regulatory certification purposes. Covers emissions testing (WLTP, FTP-75, NEDC, RDE), crash safety testing (NCAP, FMVSS), noise testing (NVH/ECE R51), and fuel economy testing. Captures test date, test facility, test type, vehicle configuration tested, test result (pass/fail/conditional), measured values, and the certifying laboratory. Links to the homologation record or emissions certification being pursued.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_test_result {
  compliance_test_result_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance test result record.']
  equipment_equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the equipment or instrument used for the measurement.']
  equipment_registry_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the equipment or instrument used for the measurement.']
  technician_id varchar [note: 'Internal identifier for the technician.']
  test_event_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent compliance test event to which this result belongs.']
  calibration_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the test equipment was calibrated at the time of measurement.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes or observations related to the measurement.']
  compliance_regulation_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the specific regulation or standard applied (e.g., EPA_2023_CO2).']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'System of record that supplied the measurement data.']
  is_outlier boolean [note: 'True if the measurement is flagged as a statistical outlier.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code of the regulatory jurisdiction.']
  lab_location_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the facility where the test was performed.']
  limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the regulatory limit; typically matches the measurement unit.']
  measured_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Numeric result of the measurement for the parameter.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Technique used to obtain the measurement.']
  measurement_pressure_kpa decimal(8,2) [note: 'Ambient or chamber pressure during the measurement, expressed in kilopascals.']
  measurement_temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Ambient or chamber temperature during the measurement, expressed in degrees Celsius.']
  measurement_uncertainty decimal(12,4) [note: 'Estimated uncertainty associated with the measured value.']
  parameter_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code or identifier for the measured parameter.']
  parameter_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the measured parameter (e.g., CO2, NOx, crash deformation zone).']
  pass_fail_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the measured value meets the regulatory limit.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the result record was initially created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the result record.']
  regulatory_limit decimal(12,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable value for the parameter as defined by the applicable regulation.']
  test_batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the batch of specimens or vehicles tested together.']
  test_phase varchar [note: 'Specific phase of the compliance test (e.g., cold start, WLTP low speed).']
  test_result_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the result record.']
  test_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the measurement was taken.']
  uncertainty_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the measurement uncertainty, matching the measurement unit.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the measured value is expressed.']

  Note: 'Detailed test result record for each measured parameter within a compliance test event. Captures parameter name (CO2 g/km, NOx mg/km, crash deformation zone, noise dB), measured value, regulatory limit, pass/fail status, test phase (cold start, hot start, WLTP low/medium/high/extra-high), and measurement uncertainty. Enables granular traceability of test outcomes against specific regulatory thresholds for each parameter tested.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_requirement {
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each regulatory requirement record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Link regulatory requirement to its governing compliance document.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Specify the jurisdiction for each regulatory requirement.']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'Latest date by which Automotive must achieve compliance.']
  compliance_requirement_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of the key compliance obligations imposed by the regulation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory requirement record was first created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulation becomes effective.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulation is no longer applicable (if applicable).']
  is_global boolean [note: 'True if the regulation applies across all markets; false if market‑specific.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether compliance with the regulation is mandatory (true) or optional (false).']
  issuing_body varchar [note: 'Organization that issued the regulation (e.g., NHTSA, EPA, UNECE, IATF).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the regulation was last reviewed for updates or changes.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this record.']
  market varchar [note: 'Geographic market or jurisdiction to which the regulation applies.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Powertrain technologies to which the regulation applies.']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'Official document number or docket identifier used by the issuing body.']
  regulation_code varchar [note: 'Official code or identifier assigned by the issuing body (e.g., "FMVSS 208", "ECE R94").']
  regulation_type varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the regulation purpose.']
  regulatory_requirement_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the regulation (e.g., "Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard 208").']
  regulatory_requirement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the regulation.']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the regulation\'s applicability and scope.']
  source_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the official regulation document or web page.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the regulatory requirement record.']
  vehicle_category varchar [note: 'Vehicle segment covered by the regulation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: passenger|light_truck|heavy_truck|commercial|motorcycle|electric|hybrid — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  version varchar [note: 'Version or revision identifier of the regulation (e.g., "v2.1").']

  Note: 'Reference master defining all applicable regulatory requirements and standards that Automotive must comply with across jurisdictions. Captures regulation name, issuing body (NHTSA, EPA, CARB, UNECE, IATF, ISO), regulation code (e.g., FMVSS 208, ECE R94, Euro 6d), effective date, applicability scope (market, vehicle category, powertrain type), compliance deadline, and current status (active, superseded, proposed). Serves as the regulatory obligation register.'
}

Table compliance.jurisdiction {
  jurisdiction_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the jurisdiction record.']
  parent_jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent jurisdiction for hierarchical grouping (e.g., state belongs to a country).']
  regulatory_body_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.regulatory_body']
  cafe_target_gpm decimal(6,3) [note: 'Corporate Average Fuel Economy target for the jurisdiction expressed in grams per mile.']
  compliance_documentation_url varchar [note: 'Link to the repository of official compliance documents for the jurisdiction.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the jurisdiction record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Default currency used for financial reporting in this jurisdiction.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the jurisdiction became active for Automotive\'s compliance tracking.']
  emissions_standard_tier varchar [note: 'Applicable emissions certification tier (e.g., EPA Tier 2, Euro 6, WLTP) for vehicles sold in this jurisdiction.']
  epa_emission_limit_g_per_km decimal(6,2) [note: 'Maximum permissible emissions level for vehicles under EPA standards in this jurisdiction.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the jurisdiction record is retired or no longer applicable (nullable).']
  homologation_process_time_days varchar [note: 'Typical number of calendar days required to complete homologation.']
  is_eu_member boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the jurisdiction is a member of the European Union.']
  iso_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code representing the jurisdiction\'s primary country.']
  jurisdiction_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text providing additional context or notes about the jurisdiction.']
  jurisdiction_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the regulatory jurisdiction (e.g., United States, European Union).']
  jurisdiction_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the jurisdiction record.']
  jurisdiction_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the jurisdiction based on its governmental level.']
  market_entry_requirements varchar [note: 'Key regulatory and administrative conditions required for market entry (e.g., certification documents, testing procedures).']
  ncap_rating_required varchar [note: 'Minimum NCAP safety rating required for vehicles sold in the jurisdiction.']
  recall_reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory requirement for vehicle recall reporting in the jurisdiction.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Code used to group jurisdictions into broader regions (e.g., NA for North America, EU for Europe).']
  regulatory_body_website varchar [note: 'Web address of the primary regulatory authority.']
  safety_standard_framework varchar [note: 'Safety regulation framework governing vehicle homologation (e.g., FMVSS, UNECE, NCAP).']
  tax_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Typical statutory tax rate applied to vehicle sales in the jurisdiction.']
  unece_type_approval_code varchar [note: 'Code representing UNECE type approval classification for the jurisdiction.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the jurisdiction record.']
  wltp_test_cycle varchar [note: 'Specific WLTP test cycle applicable (e.g., WLTP 2020).']

  Note: 'Reference master for regulatory jurisdictions in which Automotive operates and sells vehicles. Captures jurisdiction name, jurisdiction type (federal, state, national, supranational), country or region code, primary regulatory body, applicable emissions standard tier, applicable safety standard framework, and market entry requirements. Used to map vehicles and certifications to the correct regulatory regime for each sales market.'
}

Table compliance.obligation {
  obligation_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the compliance obligation record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the stored certification document.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Add jurisdiction reference to obligations for regional compliance tracking.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal engineering team accountable for the obligation.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Connect obligations to the specific regulatory requirement they fulfill.']
  vehicle_program_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vehicle program or model line to which the obligation applies.']
  actual_certification_date date [note: 'Date on which certification was actually obtained.']
  audit_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compliance obligation record was first created in the system.']
  audit_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the compliance obligation record.']
  certification_body varchar [note: 'External agency or authority that issues the certification (e.g., EPA, NHTSA).']
  compliance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score (0‑100) reflecting overall compliance health for the obligation.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Deadline for completing corrective actions.']
  corrective_action_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions to remediate non‑compliance.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the compliance obligation becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the compliance obligation expires or is no longer applicable.']
  emission_value decimal(10,3) [note: 'Measured emission metric (e.g., g/km CO₂) associated with the obligation.']
  evidence_document_path varchar [note: 'File system or URL path to supporting evidence files.']
  fuel_economy_value decimal(6,2) [note: 'Measured fuel economy (e.g., mpg or L/100km) relevant to the obligation.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the obligation is deemed critical for vehicle launch.']
  is_regulatory boolean [note: 'True if the obligation is mandated by external regulation; false if internal policy.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the obligation was last reviewed for status or changes.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle program for which the regulatory requirement is scoped.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next compliance review.']
  non_compliance_reason varchar [note: 'Root cause description for a non‑compliant status.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or additional information about the obligation.']
  obligation_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the regulatory obligation, often used in internal tracking and external filings.']
  obligation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the compliance obligation.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the obligation.']
  regulation_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code or identifier for the regulation as defined by the governing body.']
  regulation_name varchar [note: 'Full official name of the regulation (e.g., "EPA Tier 3 Emissions Standard").']
  regulation_type varchar [note: 'Category of the regulation (e.g., emissions, safety, fuel economy, noise, or other).']
  responsible_engineering_group varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the engineering group leading the compliance effort.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk associated with non‑compliance for this obligation.']
  target_certification_date date [note: 'Planned date by which certification is expected to be achieved.']
  test_date date [note: 'Date on which the regulatory test was performed.']
  test_facility varchar [note: 'Name of the laboratory or site where testing occurred.']
  test_method varchar [note: 'Standardized method or protocol used for the test (e.g., WLTP, SAE J1979).']
  test_result varchar [note: 'Outcome of the regulatory test associated with the obligation.']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation why the obligation was waived, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Operational record linking a specific vehicle program or model year to its applicable regulatory requirements by jurisdiction. Captures the obligation status (pending, in-progress, certified, waived, non-compliant), target certification date, responsible engineering team, and associated homologation record or emissions certification. Enables compliance program managers to track which regulatory obligations are open, in-flight, or closed for each vehicle program.'
}

Table compliance.ncap_submission {
  ncap_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each NCAP test submission record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Attach the NCAP submission to its supporting compliance document.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the OEM/manufacturer that submitted the NCAP test.']
  adas_features_evaluated varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Advanced Driver Assistance Systems assessed during the test.']
  adult_occupant_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Star rating for adult occupant protection category.']
  child_occupant_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Star rating for child occupant protection category.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the NCAP submission record was first created in the system.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Geographic market region for which the NCAP submission is intended.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle under test.']
  ncap_submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the NCAP submission.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the NCAP submission.']
  overall_star_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Aggregated overall star rating awarded by the NCAP programme (e.g., 4.5).']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date when the NCAP rating results were publicly released.']
  rating_agency varchar [note: 'NCAP programme that issued the rating.']
  safety_assist_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Star rating for safety assist technologies (e.g., ADAS) evaluated in the NCAP test.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating source system that created the NCAP submission record (e.g., SAP, PLM).']
  submission_reference varchar [note: 'External reference code assigned by the manufacturer for the NCAP submission.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the NCAP submission was officially filed.']
  test_date date [note: 'Date on which the NCAP crash test was performed.']
  test_programme_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the NCAP test programme used for the submission (e.g., "Euro NCAP 2023").']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the NCAP submission record.']
  vehicle_variant varchar [note: 'Specific model variant of the vehicle that was tested (e.g., "Model X Sport").']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for the submission record to support auditability.']
  vin varchar [note: 'Unique 17‑character identifier of the tested vehicle.']
  vulnerable_road_user_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Star rating for vulnerable road user protection (pedestrians, cyclists).']

  Note: 'Master record for New Car Assessment Programme (NCAP) test submissions including Euro NCAP, NHTSA NCAP, ANCAP, and JNCAP. Captures submission date, test programme version, vehicle variant tested, star rating achieved (overall and by category: adult occupant, child occupant, vulnerable road users, safety assist), ADAS features evaluated, and publication date. Distinct from general compliance_test_event due to the structured star-rating outcome and public disclosure requirements.'
}

Table compliance.ota_compliance_approval {
  ota_compliance_approval_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the OTA compliance approval record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Link OTA compliance approval to the approval document for auditability.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the regulatory body granted the OTA approval.']
  approval_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the official approval documentation stored in the compliance repository.']
  approval_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the regulatory authority for this OTA approval.']
  approval_type varchar [note: 'Category of the OTA approval, e.g., software update, security patch, feature enablement.']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance framework, e.g., UNECE R155, R156.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the OTA compliance approval record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  cybersecurity_assessment_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the cybersecurity assessment that validated the OTA update.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the OTA approval becomes valid for deployment.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date after which the OTA approval expires or must be renewed.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code of the market where the approval applies.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle platform for which the OTA approval is applicable.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the OTA approval.']
  ota_compliance_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the OTA approval.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority that issued the OTA approval.']
  risk_assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score assigned during the OTA security evaluation.']
  software_module_identifier varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the ECU or software module targeted by the OTA update.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the OTA approval data (e.g., Geotab OTA, Bosch IoT).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the OTA compliance approval record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Classification of vehicle models covered by the OTA approval.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the OTA approval record, incremented on each change.']

  Note: 'Master record for regulatory approvals governing Over-the-Air (OTA) software updates to vehicle ECUs and ADAS systems. Captures OTA campaign reference, affected ECU or software module, regulatory body approval (UNECE R156 Software Update Management System), approval date, jurisdiction applicability, cybersecurity assessment reference, and rollout authorization status. Ensures OTA deployments comply with UNECE R155/R156 and applicable national regulations.'
}

Table compliance.fmvss_certification {
  fmvss_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for FMVSS certification record.']
  certifying_engineer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the certifying engineer.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Associate FMVSS certification with its certification document.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the certifying engineer.']
  test_facility_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the test facility where testing was performed.']
  audit_trail_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to audit trail logs for this certification.']
  certification_basis varchar [note: 'Basis of certification.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date when certification was issued.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique certification number assigned by Automotive for tracking.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the certification.']
  certifying_engineer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the engineer who signed off the certification.']
  compliance_result varchar [note: 'Result of compliance testing.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created.']
  document_hash varchar [note: 'Hash of the certification document for integrity verification.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the certification is effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date until which the certification remains effective (nullable).']
  emission_class varchar [note: 'Emission class applicable to the vehicle.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the certification expires, if applicable.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates if the certification record is currently active.']
  market varchar [note: 'Market name (e.g., US, EU, China).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle (e.g., 2023).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes regarding the certification.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Powertrain technology of the vehicle.']
  recall_implication_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this certification is linked to a recall implication.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Geographic region code where certification applies. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USA|CAN|MEX|EU|CHN|JPN|KOR — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority overseeing the certification.']
  safety_feature_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of safety feature codes (e.g., ADAS, ESC).']
  standard_number varchar [note: 'FMVSS standard number (e.g., 208, 126, 138).']
  standard_title varchar [note: 'Title of the FMVSS standard (e.g., Occupant Crash Protection).']
  submission_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory submission package.']
  test_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance test was performed.']
  test_evidence_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to test evidence documents stored in DMS.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Model name/identifier of the vehicle covered.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Category of vehicle.']
  vehicle_vin varchar [note: 'Unique 17-character VIN of the vehicle.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the certification record (incremented on changes).']

  Note: 'Master record for Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard (FMVSS) self-certification records maintained by Automotive as required by NHTSA. Captures FMVSS standard number (e.g., FMVSS 208 Occupant Crash Protection, FMVSS 126 ESC, FMVSS 138 TPMS), vehicle model and model year, certification basis (self-certification), test evidence reference, certification date, and responsible certifying engineer. Supports NHTSA audit readiness and recall root-cause traceability.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_document {
  compliance_document_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying the compliance document record.']
  approval_authorizer varchar [note: 'Name of the individual who authorized the document.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the document received formal approval.']
  authority_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or country where the issuing authority operates.']
  checksum varchar [note: 'SHA-256 hash of the document file for integrity verification.']
  compliance_document_description varchar [note: 'Brief narrative describing the purpose and content of the compliance document.']
  compliance_document_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the compliance document.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Classification indicating the sensitivity of the document content.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the document record was created in the system.']
  digital_signature_present boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the document includes a verified digital signature.']
  document_number varchar [note: 'Official reference number assigned to the compliance document by the issuing authority or internal system.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Category of the compliance document indicating its nature.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date the document\'s provisions become effective.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date after which the document is no longer valid.']
  file_format varchar [note: 'File format of the stored digital document.']
  file_size_bytes varchar [note: 'Size of the digital document file in bytes.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date the document was officially issued.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Organization or agency that issued the compliance document (e.g., EPA, NHTSA).']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three-letter country code representing the jurisdiction of the regulation.']
  language varchar [note: 'Language code (ISO 639-1) of the document content.']
  market varchar [note: 'Target market or region for which the compliance document applies.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional remarks or comments about the document.']
  regulation_type varchar [note: 'Type of regulation the document satisfies.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory organization associated with the compliance requirement (e.g., EPA, NHTSA, CARB).']
  related_model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle(s) to which the document applies.']
  related_vehicle_vin varchar [note: 'Vehicle Identification Number of a vehicle associated with the document, if applicable.']
  retention_policy varchar [note: 'Policy governing how long the document must be retained.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system of record for the document (e.g., SAP, PLM, DMS).']
  storage_uri varchar [note: 'Uniform Resource Identifier pointing to the document location in the document management system.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the document was submitted to the regulatory body.']
  title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the compliance document.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the document record.']
  version_label varchar [note: 'Human-readable version label (e.g., v1.2, Rev A).']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Sequential version identifier of the document.']

  Note: 'Master record for compliance documentation artifacts associated with regulatory submissions, certifications, and homologation records. Captures document type (Certificate of Conformity, Type Approval Certificate, Test Report, PPAP compliance evidence, IATF audit report, FMEA summary), document reference number, issuing authority, issue date, expiry date, storage location (document management system URI), and document status. Provides the document register for the compliance domain.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_audit_finding {
  compliance_audit_finding_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance_audit_finding data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Link audit findings to the specific compliance obligation they relate to.']

  Note: 'Transactional record for findings raised during regulatory audits, IATF 16949 surveillance audits, ISO 14001 environmental audits, and internal compliance audits. Captures audit type, auditing body, finding category (major non-conformance, minor non-conformance, observation, opportunity for improvement), finding description, affected process or product, corrective action required, due date, and closure status. Supports IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 corrective action management.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_corrective_action {
  compliance_corrective_action_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance_corrective_action data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).']
  compliance_audit_finding_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_audit_finding. Business justification: Tie corrective actions to the originating audit finding for traceability.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Associate corrective actions with the compliance obligation they address.']

  Note: 'Transactional record tracking corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) initiated in response to audit findings, regulatory non-conformances, or compliance violations. Captures root cause analysis method (5-Why, Ishikawa), root cause description, corrective action plan, responsible owner, implementation date, verification method, effectiveness review date, and closure status. Supports IATF 16949 clause 10.2 and regulatory corrective action commitments to NHTSA, EPA, or CARB.'
}

Table compliance.trade_compliance_record {
  trade_compliance_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the trade compliance record.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Add jurisdiction reference to trade compliance records for import/export regulation mapping.']
  procurement_supplier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the supplier providing the kit, part, or vehicle.']
  audit_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compliance record was first created in the system.']
  audit_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the compliance record.']
  compliance_officer varchar [note: 'Name of the internal officer responsible for this compliance record.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance state of the record.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO code of the country where the kit or part was manufactured.']
  customs_duty_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable duty percentage for the HS code and country of origin.']
  destination_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO code of the country where the goods are destined.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance record became effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance record expires, if applicable.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Classification indicating whether the item is subject to EAR or ITAR export controls.']
  free_trade_agreement varchar [note: 'Identifies the FTA that may reduce or eliminate duties for this shipment.']
  hs_tariff_code varchar [note: 'Six‑to‑ten digit code used to classify goods for customs duties.']
  import_license_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the import license authorizing entry of the kit or part.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance record was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments, observations, or special handling instructions.']
  origin_port varchar [note: 'UN/LOCODE of the port where the shipment originated.']
  part_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturer part number when the record relates to an individual component.']
  product_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the record pertains to a completely knocked down kit, semi‑knocked down kit, finished vehicle, or individual part.']
  record_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the compliance system for tracking.']
  trade_regulation_code varchar [note: 'Code of the specific regulation governing the trade (e.g., EPA emissions, NHTSA FMVSS).']
  vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Name/identifier of the vehicle model (e.g., Corolla, F‑150).']
  vehicle_model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle associated with the compliance record, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Master record for import/export trade compliance covering CKD (Completely Knocked Down) and SKD (Semi Knocked Down) vehicle kits, parts, and finished vehicles. Captures HS tariff code, country of origin, export control classification (EAR/ITAR), free trade agreement applicability (USMCA, EU-Japan EPA), customs duty rate, import license reference, and compliance status. Supports trade compliance obligations across Automotive\'s global manufacturing and distribution footprint.'
}

Table compliance.environmental_permit {

  plant_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing plant or facility associated with the permit.']
