  compliance_monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often compliance monitoring is performed for this permit.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status based on monitoring results.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the permit record was created in the system.']
  emission_report_submission_date date [note: 'Date when the latest emission report was submitted to the authority.']
  environmental_permit_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the permit.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the permit expires unless renewed.']
  is_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is exempt from certain permit requirements.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date when the permit was officially issued.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory body that issued the permit.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance inspection for the permit.']
  monitoring_method varchar [note: 'Method used to monitor emissions for the permit.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required inspection.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional remarks or observations about the permit.']
  permit_category varchar [note: 'Level of government that issued the permit.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned by the issuing authority to the environmental permit.']
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Category of environmental permit indicating the regulated activity.']
  pollutant_code varchar [note: 'Standard code for the pollutant covered by the permit limit.']
  pollutant_limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement for the pollutant limit.']
  pollutant_limit_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable emission amount for the pollutant per reporting period.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory organization overseeing the permit.']
  renewal_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the permit renewal process.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the permit record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version of the permit record for audit purposes.']

  Note: 'Master record for environmental operating permits held by Automotive manufacturing plants and facilities. Captures permit type (air emissions permit, wastewater discharge permit, hazardous waste permit), issuing regulatory authority (EPA, state environmental agency), permit number, facility reference, permitted emission limits by pollutant, permit issue date, expiry date, renewal status, and compliance monitoring frequency. Supports ISO 14001 environmental management and EPA reporting obligations.'
}

Table compliance.emissions_monitoring_reading {
  emissions_monitoring_reading_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each emissions monitoring reading record.']
  environmental_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.environmental_permit. Business justification: Associate emissions monitoring readings with the specific environmental permit they satisfy.']
  monitoring_point_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the physical monitoring location (e.g., stack, wastewater discharge point, ambient station).']
  calibration_date date [note: 'Date when the monitoring equipment was last calibrated.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance determination for this reading against the permitted limit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the reading record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the overall quality assessment of the reading.']
  exceedance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the measured value exceeds the permitted limit (true = exceedance).']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'ISO‑3 country code representing the geographic jurisdiction of the permit.']
  measured_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Numeric value of the pollutant concentration or emission rate recorded.']
  measurement_technique varchar [note: 'Specific technique or location category used for the measurement.']
  monitoring_method varchar [note: 'Technique used to obtain the reading, e.g., Continuous Emissions Monitoring System (CEMS) or manual sampling.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the reading.']
  permitted_limit decimal(12,4) [note: 'Regulatory or permit‑based maximum allowable value for the pollutant.']
  pollutant_type varchar [note: 'Type of pollutant measured, aligned with regulatory reporting categories.']
  reading_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the emissions measurement was recorded at the monitoring point.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle status of the record within the data system.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Government agency or standards organization governing the emission limit.']
  sample_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Length of time over which the sample was collected, expressed in minutes.']
  sensor_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the sensor or instrument that captured the reading.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the reading.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the measured value is expressed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the reading record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing periodic emissions monitoring readings from manufacturing plant stacks, wastewater discharge points, and facility-level environmental monitoring stations. Captures reading timestamp, monitoring point identifier, pollutant type (NOx, SOx, VOC, CO2, particulate matter), measured value, unit of measure, permitted limit, exceedance flag, and monitoring method (CEMS, manual sampling). Supports EPA Continuous Emissions Monitoring System (CEMS) reporting and permit compliance verification.'
}

Table compliance.recall_defect_report {
  recall_defect_report_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the recall defect report record.']
  model_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to vehicle.model. Business justification: Recall defect reports are issued per vehicle model; FK to model provides quick aggregation of recall statistics by model for safety compliance.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vehicle manufacturer associated with the defect report.']
  recall_campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_recall_campaign. Business justification: Link defect reports to the recall campaign they belong to for root‑cause tracking.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: REQUIRED: Recall reports must reference the exact SKU to ensure precise part‑level remediation and dealer notifications.']
  affected_nameplates varchar [note: 'List of vehicle nameplates (e.g., Corolla, Camry) impacted by the defect.']
  defect_category varchar [note: 'High-level classification of the defect (safety, emissions, structural, other).']
  defect_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the defect and its technical details.']
  fatality_count varchar [note: 'Number of reported fatalities associated with the defect.']
  incident_count varchar [note: 'Total number of defect incidents reported in this submission.']
  injury_count varchar [note: 'Number of reported injuries associated with the defect.']
  investigation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the NHTSA investigation related to this defect.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the affected vehicle.']
  nhtsa_investigation_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the NHTSA investigation, if opened.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text comments or observations related to the report.']
  recall_defect_report_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the report record.']
  recall_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the associated recall campaign, if any.']
  regulation_code varchar [note: 'Code of the specific regulation or standard referenced (e.g., FMVSS 111).']
  regulatory_agency varchar [note: 'Regulatory body overseeing the report or investigation.']
  remedy_description varchar [note: 'Description of the corrective action or remedy proposed for the defect.']
  report_creation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the recall defect report record was created in the system.']
  report_last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the report record.']
  report_number varchar [note: 'External identifier assigned to the recall defect report by the reporting entity.']
  report_submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the report was submitted to the regulatory agency.']
  report_type varchar [note: 'Category of the report submitted (e.g., Early Warning Reporting quarterly, Part 579 defect, consumer complaint aggregate, field report).']
  reporting_period varchar [note: 'The calendar period (e.g., 2023-Q1) that the report covers.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system of record where the report originated (e.g., SAP, MES).']
  vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Model name or code of the vehicle affected by the defect.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the report record for audit purposes.']
  vin_range_end varchar [note: 'Ending VIN in the range of vehicles affected.']
  vin_range_start varchar [note: 'Starting VIN in the range of vehicles affected.']

  Note: 'Transactional record for Early Warning Reporting (EWR) and defect investigation reports submitted to or received from NHTSA. Captures report type (EWR quarterly report, Part 579 defect report, consumer complaint aggregate, field report), reporting period, defect category (safety, emissions, structural), number of incidents reported, injury/fatality count, investigation status, and NHTSA investigation number if opened. Supports 49 CFR Part 579 Early Warning Reporting obligations.'
}

Table compliance.waiver {
  waiver_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the compliance waiver record.']
  compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_document. Business justification: Link waivers to their supporting compliance document.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Add jurisdiction reference to waivers for regional applicability.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Tie waivers to the specific compliance obligation they modify.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Associate waivers with the regulatory requirement they exempt.']
  amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary value associated with the waiver, if any.']
  applicable_market varchar [note: 'Geographic market or region where the waiver is valid.']
  applicable_model_year_end varchar [note: 'Last model year for which the waiver is applicable.']
  applicable_model_year_start varchar [note: 'First model year for which the waiver is applicable.']
  applicable_vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Vehicle model(s) to which the waiver applies.']
  conditions_attached varchar [note: 'Specific conditions or obligations that must be met while the waiver is in effect.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waiver record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for the waiver amount.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the waiver becomes effective for compliance purposes.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the waiver expires or ceases to be effective.']
  granted_date date [note: 'Date on which the waiver was officially granted.']
  granting_authority varchar [note: 'Organization or agency that granted the waiver.']
  justification varchar [note: 'Business rationale and supporting arguments for obtaining the waiver.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often compliance monitoring must be performed.']
  monitoring_method varchar [note: 'Method used for monitoring (e.g., reporting, audit, sensor data).']
  monitoring_requirements varchar [note: 'Requirements for compliance monitoring during the waiver period.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments related to the waiver.']
  reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number used by the authority for tracking the waiver.']
  regulation_code varchar [note: 'Official code or identifier of the regulation to which the waiver applies.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory body responsible for the underlying regulation (e.g., EPA, CARB, NHTSA).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system of record for the waiver (e.g., SAP, PLM).']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier that last updated the waiver record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the waiver record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version number for the waiver record to support change tracking.']
  waiver_description varchar [note: 'Brief textual description of the waiver purpose and scope.']
  waiver_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the granting authority to the waiver.']
  waiver_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the waiver.']
  waiver_type varchar [note: 'Category of the waiver, such as CAFE exemption, CARB ZEV credit waiver, FMVSS temporary exemption, or other.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier that created the waiver record.']

  Note: 'Master record for regulatory waivers, exemptions, and derogations granted to Automotive by regulatory bodies. Captures waiver type (CAFE small manufacturer exemption, CARB ZEV credit waiver, FMVSS temporary exemption), granting authority, waiver reference number, applicable regulation, justification basis, granted date, expiry date, conditions attached, and compliance monitoring requirements during the waiver period.'
}

Table compliance.zev_credit {
  zev_credit_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each ZEV credit record.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Link ZEV credit transactions to jurisdiction for regional credit accounting.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external party involved in a credit transfer or retirement.']
  compliance_program varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance program under which the credit is tracked.']
  counterparty_role varchar [note: 'Role of the counterparty in the credit transaction.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the credit record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  credit_basis varchar [note: 'Basis on which the credit was earned, such as vehicle sales volume, powertrain type, or fleet volume.']
  credit_price_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary valuation of a single credit in U.S. dollars, if applicable for trading.']
  credit_quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Number of credits (can be fractional) associated with the transaction.']
  credit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the credit record.']
  credit_transaction_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier for the credit transaction, used in regulatory filings and audits.']
  credit_type varchar [note: 'Category of credit earned or managed, indicating zero‑emission vehicle (ZEV) or greenhouse‑gas (GHG) credit.']
  credit_vintage_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the credit was originally earned.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date the credit becomes effective for compliance accounting.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date the credit expires if not used or retired.']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Model year of the vehicle or powertrain that generated the credit.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or audit notes related to the credit transaction.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Technology classification of the powertrain associated with the credit.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or jurisdiction code where the credit is reported.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority governing the credit (e.g., CARB, EPA).']
  retirement_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why a credit was retired (e.g., compliance fulfillment, voluntary surrender).']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the source record in the originating system.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating IT system that supplied the credit record (e.g., SAP, PLM).']
  transaction_date date [note: 'Date the credit event (earn, transfer, retirement) occurred.']
  transaction_reference_number varchar [note: 'External reference number for the credit transfer or retirement filing.']
  transaction_type varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the credit event: earn, transfer, or retire.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the credit record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Optimistic concurrency control version for the credit record.']

  Note: 'Master record for Zero Emission Vehicle (ZEV) and greenhouse gas (GHG) compliance credits earned, purchased, transferred, or retired under CARB ZEV mandate and EPA GHG credit programs. Captures credit type (ZEV, TZEV, AT PZEV, GHG), model year, credit quantity, credit vintage, earning basis (vehicle sales volume, powertrain type), credit status (earned, banked, transferred, retired), and counterparty for credit transfers. Supports CARB ZEV mandate compliance and EPA GHG credit banking strategy.'
}

Table compliance.homologation_market_approval {
  homologation_market_approval_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the homologation market approval record.']
  homologation_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.homologation_record. Business justification: Link homologation_market_approval to its parent homologation_record to capture market‑specific approval status.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Link homologation_market_approval to jurisdiction for market context.']
  additional_requirements varchar [note: 'Extra documentation, testing, or reporting obligations attached to the approval.']
  approval_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the governmental or standards body that granted the market approval (e.g., NHTSA, EPA, CARB, Euro NCAP).']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the approval authority formally granted the approval.']
  approval_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned by the approval authority to this specific market approval.']
  approval_status_date date [note: 'Date when the approval status last changed (e.g., from pending to approved).']
  approval_type varchar [note: 'Category of the approval (initial, supplemental, or renewal).']
  body_style varchar [note: 'Physical configuration of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV).']
  compliance_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the electronic copy of the approval certificate or supporting documentation.']
  conditions_of_approval varchar [note: 'Specific conditions, limitations, or compliance actions required by the authority.']
  derogations varchar [note: 'Any market‑specific exemptions or deviations granted from standard requirements.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the approval becomes legally effective for sales.']
  emission_standard varchar [note: 'Regulatory emissions regime applicable (e.g., EPA Tier 3, Euro 6, WLTP).']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the approval ceases to be valid unless renewed.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary energy source of the vehicle powertrain.']
  homologation_market_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the market approval.']
  market_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code representing the market or jurisdiction where the vehicle variant is approved.']
  market_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region grouping of markets (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia‑Pacific).']
  model_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the vehicle model is marketed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the approval.']
  powertrain_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the vehicle\'s powertrain technology.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the approval record was first created in the data lake.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the approval record.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system of record (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Teamcenter PLM).']
  test_cycle varchar [note: 'Laboratory test cycle used for emissions or fuel‑consumption testing.']
  test_date date [note: 'Date the certification test was performed.']
  test_lab varchar [note: 'Name of the accredited laboratory that conducted the test.']
  vehicle_model varchar [note: 'Manufacturer‑defined model name or code of the vehicle variant covered by the approval.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the approval record, incremented on each amendment.']

  Note: 'Association record linking a homologation record to a specific market/jurisdiction approval status. Captures market, approval authority, approval date, approval number, validity period, conditions of approval, and any market-specific derogations or additional requirements. Enables tracking of which vehicle variants are approved for sale in which markets, supporting global market launch planning and compliance status dashboards.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_change_notice {
  regulatory_change_notice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the regulatory change notice record.']
  compliance_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Internal employee or team responsible for managing compliance to this notice.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Internal employee or team responsible for managing compliance to this notice.']
  regulatory_body_id varchar [note: 'Internal identifier of the regulatory agency responsible for the notice.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Tie change notices to the regulatory requirement they amend.']
  affected_vehicle_programs varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of vehicle programs (model lines) potentially impacted by the regulatory change.']
  comment_period_end_date date [note: 'Final date by which stakeholders may submit comments on the proposed regulation.']
  comment_period_extended boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the original comment period has been extended.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the notice record was first created in the data lake.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the estimated impact cost.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date the regulation or rule becomes legally effective.']
  estimated_impact_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Projected financial impact (cost) to the organization resulting from the regulatory change.']
  extended_comment_deadline date [note: 'New deadline date if the comment period was extended.']
  impact_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Progress status of the internal impact assessment for this notice.']
  impact_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the anticipated operational or financial impact.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country or region code where the regulation applies.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the regulatory change notice.']
  notice_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned by the publishing body to the regulatory change notice.']
  notice_type varchar [note: 'Category of the notice indicating its stage in the rulemaking process.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date the regulatory notice was officially published.']
  publishing_body varchar [note: 'Organization or agency that issued the regulatory change notice.']
  regulation_reference varchar [note: 'Official code or identifier of the underlying regulation (e.g., EPA‑40CFR106.10).']
  regulatory_change_notice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the regulatory change notice.']
  related_documents varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of URLs or internal IDs for supporting documentation.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the notice data (e.g., SAP, Teamcenter).']
  source_system_record_reference varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the notice in the source system.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the notice record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record tracking incoming regulatory changes, proposed rules, and final rules published by governing bodies that may impact Automotive\'s products or operations. Captures regulation reference, publishing body, notice type (NPRM, Final Rule, Guidance Document, Technical Circular), publication date, comment period deadline, effective date, impact assessment status, affected vehicle programs, and assigned compliance owner. Supports proactive regulatory horizon scanning and impact assessment.'
}

Table compliance.emissions_monitoring_point {
  emissions_monitoring_point_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for emissions_monitoring_point']
  parent_emissions_monitoring_point_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on emissions_monitoring_point (parent_emissions_monitoring_point_id)']
  alert_status varchar [note: 'Current alert condition based on the latest reading.']
  calibration_date date [note: 'Most recent date the sensor was calibrated.']
  calibration_status varchar [note: 'Current calibration status of the sensor.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the point resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the monitoring point record was created in the system.']
  data_capture_frequency_seconds varchar [note: 'Interval in seconds between consecutive emissions readings.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the reliability of the latest reading.']
  decommission_date date [note: 'Date the sensor was removed or retired (null if still active).']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the monitoring point location, purpose, or special notes.']
  emission_standard varchar [note: 'Applicable emissions standard or test protocol for the point.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or facility where the point is installed.']
  installation_date date [note: 'Date the sensor was installed at the monitoring point.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority governing the emissions data for this point.']
  last_read_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent emissions measurement.']
  last_read_value decimal(10,3) [note: 'Most recent emissions measurement value.']
  location_latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the monitoring point (decimal degrees).']
  location_longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the monitoring point (decimal degrees).']
  measurement_range_max decimal(10,3) [note: 'Highest measurable emission value for the sensor.']
  measurement_range_min decimal(10,3) [note: 'Lowest measurable emission value for the sensor.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement for emissions values recorded at this point.']
  next_calibration_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required calibration.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Supplemental information or comments entered by engineers or compliance staff.']
  point_code varchar [note: 'External code or tag used to reference the monitoring point in regulatory filings.']
  point_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the emissions monitoring point.']
  point_type varchar [note: 'Category of emissions measured at the point (e.g., exhaust, evaporative).']
  sensor_model varchar [note: 'Manufacturer model number of the emissions sensor.']
  sensor_serial_number varchar [note: 'Unique serial number of the emissions sensor (device identifier).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the monitoring point.']
  threshold_value decimal(10,3) [note: 'Emissions value that triggers an alert; expressed in the measurement unit.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the monitoring point record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for emissions_monitoring_point. Referenced by monitoring_point_id.'
}

Table compliance.test_facility {
  test_facility_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for test_facility']
  parent_test_facility_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on test_facility (parent_test_facility_id)']
  audit_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the facility record was first created in the data lake.']
  audit_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the facility record.']
  capacity_per_day varchar [note: 'Maximum number of vehicles that can be tested in a full day.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the facility\'s certification.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Regulatory program under which the facility is certified.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the facility is located.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the facility\'s primary contact.']
  contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person for the facility.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the facility\'s primary contact.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the facility.']
  emission_test_type varchar [note: 'Primary emission measurement performed at the facility.']
  energy_source varchar [note: 'Dominant energy source used to power test equipment.']
  established_date date [note: 'Date the facility was originally opened.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the facility in regulatory filings and internal systems.']
  facility_type varchar [note: 'Category of testing services provided by the facility.']
  is_24x7 boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility operates continuously (true) or not (false).']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Most recent date a regulatory or internal inspection was performed.']
  latitude double [note: 'Latitude coordinate of the facility.']
  location_address varchar [note: 'Street address of the test facility.']
  longitude double [note: 'Longitude coordinate of the facility.']
  max_speed_kph varchar [note: 'Highest vehicle speed (km/h) that can be safely tested at the facility.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the test facility.']
  next_certification_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required certification renewal.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information about the facility.']
  operating_hours_per_day varchar [note: 'Number of hours the facility operates each day.']
  safety_test_type varchar [note: 'Primary safety test category conducted at the facility.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the facility location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the facility.']
  test_capability_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the testing capabilities offered.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for test_facility. Referenced by test_facility_id.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_body {
  regulatory_body_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for regulatory_body']
  parent_regulatory_body_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on regulatory_body (parent_regulatory_body_id)']
  abbreviation varchar [note: 'Common short name or acronym of the regulatory body.']
  address varchar [note: 'Physical mailing address of the regulatory body headquarters.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary contact email address for the regulatory body.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory body record was initially created.']
  data_privacy_level varchar [note: 'Data privacy classification level for information received from this body.']
  description varchar [note: 'Additional free-text description or notes about the regulatory body.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory body entry became effective in the system.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory body entry is no longer valid (if applicable).']
  iso_iec_codes varchar [note: 'List of ISO or IEC codes associated with the regulatory body (e.g., ISO 26262).']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the regulatory body has authority.']
  last_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the regulatory body record.']
  name varchar [note: 'Official full name of the regulatory authority.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Main telephone number for the regulatory body.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic region classification (e.g., North America, Europe).']
  regulatory_type varchar [note: 'Category of regulatory authority (e.g., environmental, safety, trade).']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Typical reporting frequency required by the body (e.g., annual, quarterly).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the regulatory body in the system.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Official website URL of the regulatory body.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for regulatory_body. Referenced by regulatory_body_id.'
}
